title: AI Mockup Designer (Lovart Prompting – Storefront Sign Visualizations)
description:
Overview



We are a signage company that designs and installs 3D LED storefront signs. Before producing a sign, we show potential clients a realistic AI mockup of how their sign would look on their building.



We are looking for someone skilled with AI image generation and prompting (especially Lovart) to create these mockups.



A typical project takes 30–70 minutes depending on complexity.



This position starts per project, but reliable designers can move into a long-term full-time role.





What You Will Do



You will receive:

• a storefront photo

• the business logo

• instructions for the sign



Your task is to:



• use Lovart to generate storefront mockups

• create 3D sign versions of the logo

• place the sign realistically on the building

• generate day and night versions

• export a simple vector file of the sign layout



Important

About 80% of the work is prompting Lovart correctly to generate the right storefront and signage look.



Graphic design skills help, but strong AI prompting skills are more important.





Tools



• Lovart AI

• ChatGPT (prompt refinement)

• Photoshop or similar

• Illustrator or other vector software





Requirements



• Experience with AI image generation

• Ability to write and refine prompts

• Basic understanding of lighting and perspective

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions





Output per Project



• storefront mockups

• day & night versions

• multiple sign variations

• vector sign layout





Accuracy is important — these mockups are shown directly to potential customers.

title: Senior Backend PHP Engineer | Independent Contractor
description:
Senior Backend PHP Engineer (API-First)



We’re hiring a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to design and build the scalable backend of a global ecommerce platform. You’ll lead API development, modernize legacy systems, and drive technical excellence across the engineering team.



What You’ll Do



- Design and maintain high-performance REST/GraphQL APIs for a headless platform

- Own backend services end-to-end (architecture ? deployment)

- Lead backend modernization with a pragmatic, API-first approach

- Mentor developers and promote clean, scalable code practices

- Collaborate with product and frontend teams to translate business goals into technical solutions

- Advocate best practices (OpenAPI, CI/CD, automated testing)



Requirements



- 6+ years backend development experience with strong PHP expertise

- Deep experience with PHP 8+ and modern frameworks (e.g., Symfony)

- Strong API design experience (REST or GraphQL)

- Solid MySQL/MariaDB knowledge and performance optimization skills

- Experience with Git and Agile methodologies

- Comfortable using AI tools to improve development efficiency



Nice to Have



- Ecommerce or high-traffic platform experience

- AWS/GCP, Docker, Kubernetes

- Experience with async systems (e.g., Pub/Sub, SQS)



If you're interested, apply here:




Messages sent via OLJ or other platforms will be disregarded

title: Full Stack Developer (PHP + JS) | Independent Contractor
description:
Full-Stack Developer (PHP + JavaScript)



Are you a creative and experienced developer eager to make an impact in a fast-paced, high-performance environment? We are building innovative digital solutions that simplify complex processes at scale, serving customers worldwide.



As a Full-Stack Developer, you will collaborate with a driven and diverse team, push technical boundaries, and build features that significantly enhance product performance and user experience. This role offers strong growth potential in a dynamic, innovation-focused culture.



What You’ll Do

title: AI Video Creator - Ecommerce
description:
HOW TO APPLY: 

Submit your application here >> 



AI Video Creator - Ecommerce (Remote, Full-Time)



We are a growing ecommerce brand looking for an AI-native video creator who is obsessed with AI tools and knows how to make them work - even when they don't cooperate.



What You'll Be Doing

- Studying high-performing short-form video ads and understanding why they work - the hook, the pacing, the structure

- Recreating winning video formats for our products using AI video tools (Higgsfield.ai, TopView.ai, and similar)

- When AI output isn't perfect, you troubleshoot, iterate, and keep pushing until you get a usable result

- When AI simply can't fix something, you use your video editing skills to cover it - crop it, add b-roll, swap a clip, whatever it takes

- The end goal: a polished, scroll-stopping video ad. How you get there is up to you.



You Are the Right Person If:

- You genuinely enjoy experimenting with AI tools - you find bugs exciting, not frustrating

- You don't give up when something looks broken. You try another way.

- You understand what makes a video ad perform (hook, pacing, CTA, emotional pull)

- You have solid video editing skills as your safety net when AI falls short

- You're proactive - you bring solutions, not problems



Tools You'll Be Working With

- Higgsfield.ai, TopView.ai, Kling, and other emerging AI video tools

- CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects for editing

- We will provide tool access and training materials



Requirements

- Proven video editing experience (portfolio required)

- Hands-on experience with at least one AI video tool (show us what you've made)

- Strong eye for what makes content engaging on TikTok / Reels / YouTube Shorts

- Reliable internet connection and own computer setup

- Available Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM Philippine Time



Salary: USD $500/month, paid monthly via Wise



HOW TO APPLY: 

Submit your application here >>

title: TikTok Video Editor (U.S. Market)
description:
We are looking for an experienced TikTok video editor to help us create short-form content for our brand of books for couples.

Our goal is to create engaging, scroll-stopping content focused on the U.S. TikTok market, with the objective of driving organic traffic to 
 and increasing book sales.

We are looking for someone who thinks beyond simple editing and understands how to create content that captures attention and retains viewers.

This is intended to be a long-term collaboration, as our brand is growing quickly and we want to expand our team with talented people who can help us scale.



1) What You Will Do



Your main task will be editing short TikTok videos using the assets we provide.

We will send you:

• Product clips

• Snitch clips (scroll-stopping hooks)

• Images and videos of the book interior and cover

• Clips showing people writing inside the book

The editing style is simple product-focused content (not UGC).



Typical videos will combine:

• Snitch clip

• Book interior pages

• Cover of the book

• Hands flipping pages or writing inside the book

• On-screen text



These books are interactive couple albums, so the visual storytelling is important.

At the beginning we will provide the text overlays, but later we would like you to propose catchy text ideas based on what performs best on the account. The same with the snitch clips.



Your role will also include testing different styles, identifying what performs best, and then replicating the winning formats.

TikTok penalizes duplicate content, so it is extremely important that you are a very organized person.

You must be careful not to reuse the same clips or combinations repeatedly in ways that could create duplicate content issues.



2) Additional Content Creation



Besides product videos, we will also need another type of content:

iMessage/Instagram DM/WhatsApp-style conversations between couples.

We will initially send you example screenshots of conversations.



From there, we would like you to:

• Create new conversation ideas

• Generate the conversation images

• Deliver them cropped and ready to post



Each conversation should be divided into 7–8 images (depen on the length of the conversation)

We will also need video versions of these conversations, for example:



• One person sends a message

• We see the other person typing

• The reply appears

• The conversation builds tension

• The product appears at the end

• Sometimes we may start the video with a snitch clip hook before the conversation begins.



We will send some snitch clip examples, but we also want someone resourceful who can find additional hook clips when needed.

Please confirm that you have access to iMessage/Instagra
ssage or WhatsApp and that you are able to generate these types of conversation visuals and you can record your own screen to create these videos. (!) Very important.



3) Workflow



We will provide all the clips and assets you need. We are looking for someone who can produce short videos of around 15 seconds. Your job will be to continuously produce content during your working time.

If you work 4 hours, we expect you to produce multiple finished TikTok videos ready to upload.



Please answer in your application:

Approximately how many TikTok videos do you think you can produce per day (4h)?



4) Deliverables

We need files that are ready to upload directly to TikTok.



This includes:

• Correct format

• Proper dimensions

• High quality content (Good resolution)

• Final edited version



Our content targets the U.S. market, so it is very important that you are familiar with:

• U.S. TikTok style

• Tone and slang

• Viral content formats



5) Requirements (! IMPORTANT)



To apply, please include the following:

1. Examples of TikTok videos you have edited

2. TikTok accounts you have worked with

3. Confirm that you have read the full job post

4. Include the word COUPLE in your application

5. Tell us if you have experience creating content for the U.S. market

6. Confirm that you can create WhatsApp-style conversations and record your own mobile screen

7. Answer the question: How many videos can you realistically produce per day?

8. How do you usually edit your videos? What editing software do you use? What phone or device model do you use for editing?

Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.



6) Long-Term Opportunity



We are building a growing brand and are looking for someone who wants to work with us long-term.

If the collaboration works well, there will be continuous work and increasing volume and hours.



Thank you!

title: UGC Content Creator – AI Tech Startup (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts)
description:
Job Description:

We're hiring 10-15 creative, energetic content creators to help us launch Orca — a global AI network that pays people passive income just for keeping their laptop plugged in. Think of it like mining crypto, but instead of wasting electricity, your computer is doing real AI work.

Your job is to create short-form video and photo content that explains this concept in a way that's exciting, relatable, and shareable — no technical background needed.

What you'll be creating:



TikTok and Instagram Reels (30-90 seconds) showing how Orca works and how much people are earning

YouTube Shorts and reaction-style videos to trending AI/passive income content

Screenshot-style slideshows and carousel posts

Comment seeding on relevant posts in the AI, passive income, and tech spaces

Voiceovers, screen recordings, and talking-head videos explaining Orca simply



What we're looking for:



Comfortable on camera OR skilled at editing (both is a bonus)

Speaks natural, conversational English

Has a smartphone and basic editing app (CapCut is fine)

Understands TikTok and Instagram trends — you watch these platforms daily

Fast turnaround — we move quickly and reward people who deliver

Bonus if you have your own following or have done UGC work before



What we provide:



All scripts, talking points, and creative briefs — you never have to figure out what to say

Raw footage, screen recordings, and visual assets when needed

Clear feedback so your content keeps improving

Opportunity to grow with the company — top performers get bonuses and increased rates

Weekly pay via PayPal or Wise



This is a high-energy startup launch role. We're building something that's going to be talked about globally. If you're someone who wants to be part of something from the ground floor and get paid well for creative work, this is for you.

To apply, please include:



2-3 examples of content you've made (TikTok links, Instagram Reels, or any video work)

One sentence explaining why passive income content would be easy for you to talk about

Your available hours per week

title: Sales Support Administrator
description:
Sales Support Administrator

We are seeking a highly reliable and responsive Sales Support Administrator to build a high-trust relationship with our Sales Team. This role is critical in ensuring our sales team can operate efficiently, knowing requests will be handled quickly and accurately.

The Role

You will respond to sales team requests within 1–5 minutes and support a wide range of administrative and operational tasks, including:

- Preparing quotations

- Drafting customer
s

- Creating and updating price lists

- Customer website setups

- Freight liaison and freight quoting

- Coordinating hotshot deliveries

- Releasing orders to Starshipit

- Processing orders

- Post-sales administration

- Transcribing meeting voice notes

- Scheduling meetings and activities

- Working together with internal teams to ensure best outcomes for customers & sales team. 



You will also manage important but non-urgent administrative tasks such as returned
 campaigns, newsletter sign-ups, and freight follow-ups.

About You

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong IT skills and system confidence

- Highly responsive and detail-oriented

- Strong intuition and discernment

- Able to operate in a fast-paced environment

- Able to prioritise and reprioritise efficiently

- A team player who is hungry, humble and smart

- During work hours, work must be the sole priority. No domestic duties during contracted hours.

- Camera must stay on when in team meetings.

- Previous experience working within a sales team is preferred.

Home Office & Technical Requirements

- Dedicated workspace with no other people or animals in the room.

- Good hardware – mic and speakers must be high quality with noise cancelling.

- Quality camera

- Dedicated work computer/laptop - don’t switch between different computers to do work. 

- Strong electricity and Wi-Fi connection. 

- Reliable generator - so work time is not interrupted in the case of a power outage. 

Work Hours

- Monday to Friday

- 8:00am – 5:00pm AEDT

- 1-hour unpaid break (between 3:00pm – 4:00pm AEDT)

- One 15-minute paid break per day

title: Bookkeeping
description:
Bookkeeping on 
 which is well documented. At first part-time. Eventually you will be working full-time. Long hours, but you will be part owner. Each worker is expected to eventually handle 80 clients per month. No payroll because it will be outsourced. Restaurant Bookkeeping.



What do you mean by part owner? After a year of work, you will have the opportunity to "own" 5% of your client's income. This amount is significant because the average client pays around $500 USD per month. You will eventually work on 80 clients. 



Do you want a career or a job?? A career has a future and a job is well a job. I provide careers with upward mobility.



We pay monthly. The first month is hard because you haven't earned anything yet. But I will provide you for the first month $300 USD to hold you until when you get paid.

title: Funnel Builder (Remote)
description:
Join our fast-growing e-commerce company and help us build high-converting funnels across multiple international stores.



We’re looking for a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and proactive Funnel Builder who can create, optimize, and maintain funnels for our e-commerce stores.

You must be fast, organized, and extremely reliable — someone who loves building clean, high-performing funnels.



? What You Will Do (Responsibilities)

- Funnel Building & Design

- Build high-converting funnels inside Funnelish (or similar tools)

- Create and optimize: Advertorials 

                                       Salespages

                                       Checkout pages

                                       Upsells & downsells

                                       Thank-you pages

- Ensure perfect mobile responsiveness, clean layout, and strong UX

- Add product sections, reviews, testimonials, FAQs, feature blocks, and objection handlers

- Replicate competitor funnels and improving them with accuracy and speed

- Appliying the basics of direct response copywriting



Technical Setup

- Install & configure tracking pixels (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

- Set up domain connections, DNS, and integrations

- Add payment gateways (Stripe), shipping logic, and automations

- Ensure fast load speeds and stable funnel performance

- Troubleshoot technical issues quickly



Copy & Creative Implementation

- Insert and format copywriting provided by our team

- Place high-quality images, icons, product mockups, badges, and videos

- Follow brand guidelines consistently across all funnels

- Improve clarity, flow, and visual structure for maximum conversions

- Making prompts to generate the best possible images using text to image ai



Optimization & QA

- Fully optimize for mobile-first performance

- Deliver funnels that are “traffic-ready” without needing rework

- Follow internal SOPs and help improve them over time



???? What Success Looks Like (Expected Results)

- Funnels delivered fast, clean, and without errors

- Perfect mobile responsiveness and strong UX

- Fully working tracking, pixel, and payment integrations

- No broken elements, missing assets, or layout mistakes

- Funnels ready for advertising immediately

- Conversion rates improving month after month

- Clear and reliable communication with the team



? Requirements (Must-Have)

- Proven experience building funnels in Funnelish or simular tools

- Strong understanding of conversion-focused design and direct response copywriting 

- Ability to replicate competitor funnels accurately and improve them where the competitor lacks.

- Good English communication

- Familiar with CRO principles

- Strong problem-solving and technical troubleshooting skills

- Very detail-oriented — no broken layouts, spacing issues, or typos

- Fast learner who adapts to our systems

- Full-time availability (40 hours/week)

- Reliable computer + strong internet connection



? Bonus Skills (Highly Valuable)

- Experience specifically with Funnelish

- Experience building upsell/downsell sequences

- Experience with shopify payments (while traffic comes from funnelish)

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge

- Experience setting up TikTok & Meta pixels

- Background in dropshipping or e-commerce

- Design skills (Figma, Photoshop, Canva, chatGPT)

- Prompts making with AI

- Image generation using Sora or simular ai tools

- Understanding of direct-response copywriting (Breakthrough Advertising, E5 Method, etc.)



???? What We Offer

- Long-term, stable full-time role

- 100% remote work

- A fast-growing company with strong systems and SOPs

- Supportive team environment

- Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

- Opportunities to grow into Head of Funnels or Funnel Manager



???? How to Apply

Please send us:

Your CV

Portfolio or examples of funnels you’ve built (links or screenshots)

Your experience with Funnelish or similar platforms

Your expected monthly salary (PHP) or hourly rate

Your availability

title: Short Term Rental Accountant and Bookkeeper
description:
Bookkeeping & Accounts Virtual Assistant for Short Term Rental a company



Company: Stay Hosted



About Stay Hosted

Stay Hosted is a growing UK-based short-term rental management company managing 27 Airbnb and serviced accommodation properties across the UK. We handle everything from guest communication to operations and finance for our clients.

As the business continues to scale, we’re looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeping & Accounts VA to take ownership of day-to-day financial admin and reporting.



Role Overview

This role is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, ensuring accounts are up to date in Xero, and supporting monthly reporting for both the business and our property owners.

You’ll work closely with the director and play a key role in keeping the financial side of the business organised and reliable.



Key Responsibilities

- Reconciling bank accounts and transactions in Xero

- Tracking income and expenses across multiple properties

- Logging and organising receipts and invoices

- Preparing and sending monthly client payout reports

- Tracking and maintaining key financial KPIs (business-level and property-level)

- Assisting with general bookkeeping and ad-hoc accounting tasks as required

- Flagging discrepancies, missing information, or unusual transactions



Required Skills & Experience 

- Previous experience in bookkeeping or accounts support in the Short Term Rental sector (MUST HAVE)

- Strong working knowledge of Xero (essential)

- Experience with Zapier and automations

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

- Confident working with spreadsheets and financial data

- Organised, reliable, and able to meet monthly deadlines

- Comfortable working with multiple properties and transactions



Nice to Have (Not Essential)

- Experience with UK-based businesses

- Experience preparing client reports or payout statements



Hours & Pay

Initial hours: 3 days per week, approx. 5 hours per day (times are flexible)

Pay: £3.50-£5.5 per hour, paid weekly and on time (with bonuses paid on top)

Progression: Clear opportunity for hour increases and pay progression as performance and responsibility grow

Future growth: Strong potential to move into a full-time role over the next few months as the business scales



What We’re Looking For

We’re looking for someone who treats bookkeeping as more than just data entry - someone who takes pride in clean, accurate accounts and helps keep the business financially on track.



If you’re proactive, detail-driven, and enjoy working with numbers in a fast-growing business, this role would be a great fit.

title: Ecommerce / Amazon VA
description:
About the Role



Pavin Caffè is looking for an experienced Amazon Specialist to help improve our product listings, manage advertising campaigns, and increase sales performance on Amazon.



This role focuses specifically on Amazon Seller Central operations, including listing optimization, PPC management, keyword ranking strategy, and catalog management. The goal is to improve conversion rates, increase organic rankings, and drive consistent sales growth.



Responsibilities



Amazon Listing Optimization

* Optimize product titles, bullet points, and backend keywords

* Recommend improvements to listing images to improve conversion

* Ensure listings are structured for maximum visibility and ranking



Amazon PPC Management

* Manage Sponsored Products campaigns

* Optimize bids and targeting strategies

* Add negative keywords to reduce wasted ad spend

* Monitor campaign performance and adjust accordingly



Keyword & Ranking Strategy

* Research profitable keywords

* Track keyword ranking performance

* Expand high-intent search terms to increase organic visibility



Catalog & Variation Management

* Maintain proper parent-child listing structure

* Monitor listing health and resolve catalog issues

* Ensure variations and product data are accurate



Performance Reporting

* Provide a weekly performance report including:

* Ad spend

* Sales performance

* ACOS

* CTR

* Optimization actions and recommendations



Success Metrics

The success of this role will be measured by:

* Consistent weekly growth in daily sales

* Improved conversion rate (target: minimum 20% improvement)

* Decreasing ACOS over time

* Reduced advertising waste

* Increasing share of organic orders



Requirements

We are looking for candidates who:

* Have hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central

* Have experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns

* Understand keyword ranking and listing optimization

* Are familiar with Amazon catalog structure and variations

* Can analyze campaign data and make strategic adjustments

* Are detail-oriented and organized



Important Notes

This role focuses only on Amazon Seller Central operations.

The following tasks are not included in this role:

* Social media marketing

* Shopify advertising

* Graphic design

* Influencer outreach

* Customer service



How to Apply

Please send the following:

1. Your resume

2. A short summary of your Amazon experience

3. Examples of Amazon listings or PPC campaigns you have worked on

4. What tools you use for keyword research or PPC management

Qualified candidates will be contacted for the next step in the hiring process.

8:00 PM – 12:00 AM PH Time (flexible depending on region)

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.

title: Remote Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Specialist - U.S. Custom Apparel Company ($800-$1,200/mo)
description:
We are Alien Prints LLC, a custom apparel and promotional products company based near Chicago, Illinois. We specialize in screen printing, embroidery, and DTF decoration, primarily serving construction companies and service-based businesses across the U.S.



We are building out our remote team and need an experienced recruiter to own the full hiring pipeline, from sourcing candidates all the way through onboarding and retention. This is a long-term position with consistent work, not a one-time project.



Open to full-time or part-time candidates. What matters is quality of work, not hours logged.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Recruitment (Primary Focus)

- Post job listings on platforms like OnlineJobs.ph, LinkedIn, Indeed, Upwork, and LATAM-focused job boards

- Review incoming resumes and applications daily

- Conduct first-round video interviews (Zoom or Google Meet) to assess English skills, communication, culture fit, and role-specific ability

- Write candidate summary reports with your recommendation, interview notes, and key strengths or concerns

- Present only the top 2-3 candidates per role for my final interview

- Coordinate interview scheduling between candidates and myself

- Manage trial tasks and paid test assignments for select roles (design tests, mock sales calls, etc.)

- Source candidates from both the Philippines AND Latin America depending on the role

- Maintain a candidate tracking sheet or system to keep everything organized



Onboarding New Hires

- Run a structured first-week onboarding for each new hire (tool setup, expectations walkthrough, team introductions)

- Ensure new hires have access to the platforms and systems they need on day one

- Serve as the new hire's initial point of contact for questions during their first week

- Report any early concerns or red flags to me during the onboarding period



Retention and Performance Check-ins

- Conduct 30-day and 60-day check-in calls with all new hires to assess how they are settling in

- Flag any performance concerns, attitude shifts, or communication issues early before they become bigger problems

- When a hire does not work out, coordinate the transition and immediately begin sourcing a replacement with adjusted screening criteria based on what went wrong

- Keep a warm pipeline of strong candidates so replacements can be found quickly when needed





ROLES YOU WILL BE RECRUITING FOR



- Graphic Designers (apparel/screen printing focus)

- Salespeople and Sales Managers

- Customer Service Representatives

- Marketing Manager, Paid Media Specialists, Content Creators

- Video Editors

- Temporary/Contract Web Developers

- Other roles as the business grows





REQUIREMENTS



- 2+ years of experience in recruitment or talent acquisition (BPO or staffing agency background strongly preferred)

- Experience screening candidates for U.S.-based companies

- Excellent spoken and written English (you will be conducting interviews and writing candidate summaries)

- Familiarity with job platforms like OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, LinkedIn, and ideally LATAM hiring platforms

- Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple open roles at the same time

- Comfortable on video calls and able to provide clear, written candidate assessments

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for conducting interviews





NICE TO HAVE



- Experience recruiting for creative roles (graphic design, video editing, marketing)

- Experience sourcing talent from Latin America

- Experience with onboarding remote employees or managing new hire check-ins

- Familiarity with Google Sheets, Slack, Notion, 
, or similar tools

- Background in BPO or outsourcing industry





COMPENSATION



- $5.50/hour (approximately $880-$1,060/month full-time or $550-$660/month part-time)

- Open to full-time (8 hrs/day) or part-time (4-5 hrs/day)

- Flexible schedule as long as deliverables are met. Some meetings and syncs may need to happen during Chicago business hours (U.S. Central Time)

- Long-term position with room to grow as the team scales

- Paid via Wise or PayPal





HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please answer the following in your message. Generic or copy-paste responses will not be reviewed.



1. What types of roles have you recruited for, and for what types of companies? Be specific (example: "I recruited customer service reps and graphic designers for a U.S.-based e-commerce company").



2. If I asked you to find me a great salesperson right now, what is the first thing you would do and where would you look?



3. Which job platforms have you personally posted on or sourced candidates from? List them.



4. Have you ever sourced or recruited talent from Latin America? If yes, tell me about it. If no, that is okay, just say so.



5. Are you available full-time (8 hrs/day) or part-time (4-5 hrs/day)? When during the day are you typically available to work?



6. Briefly describe how you keep track of multiple open roles and candidates at the same time. What tools or systems do you use?



7. Tell me about one specific hire that did not work out. What happened, and what would you do differently next time? (A sentence or two is fine. I am not looking for a long answer, just a real one.)

title: Cabinet Vision Kitchen Designer / Estimator (Remote)
description:
ABOUT US



We are a Canadian renovation company specializing in kitchen remodels. We receive homeowner leads and prepare kitchen layouts, renderings, and detailed estimates before our in-home consultation. Our goal is to present professional, accurate kitchen designs that help homeowners visualize their new space and give our team a clear scope before the project begins.



We are hiring a long-term remote designer who can work directly inside Cabinet Vision to support our design and estimating process.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Create kitchen cabinet layouts using Cabinet Vision based on client measurements and photos

- Convert rough field measurements and reference photos into accurate kitchen layouts

- Adjust cabinet sizes and spacing to meet standard kitchen design rules and best practices

- Generate detailed cabinet lists directly from Cabinet Vision

- Assist with estimating using our cabinet price list

- Export layout drawings and renderings for client proposals

- Prepare design revisions after customer feedback

- Organize completed designs and project files in our CRM system



---



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



- Must have REAL, hands-on experience using Cabinet Vision software — this is non-negotiable

- Must have designed kitchens or cabinetry layouts professionally before

- Must understand cabinet components including fillers, panels, toe kicks, crown molding, and hardware

- Must be comfortable reading kitchen measurements and interpreting floorplans

- Must speak and write English clearly and professionally



---



BONUS SKILLS (Nice to Have)



- Experience working inside a cabinet shop or millwork company

- Background in kitchen design or interior design

- Experience with AutoCAD or SketchUp

- Experience preparing quotes or cost estimates



---



WORKING HOURS



This role starts part-time with the potential to grow into a full-time position as we scale. We are looking for someone who is reliable, communicative, and genuinely skilled in Cabinet Vision — not just familiar with it.



---



PAY



$5–$12 USD per hour, depending on your Cabinet Vision experience and the quality of your sample work.



---



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, you MUST do the following:



1. Include the word "Shaker" in the FIRST sentence of your application message.



2. Provide at least ONE of the following:

   - A screenshot of a Cabinet Vision project you created

   - A sample kitchen layout drawing you designed

   - A screenshot of your Cabinet Vision workspace



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. We want to see real Cabinet Vision experience — please show us your work.

Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Graphic Designer to elevate our creative output with a primary focus on performance-driven creatives in Klaviyo. This role is full-time and in-house (remote). We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative but performance-aware — someone who understands that good design is not just about aesthetics, but about driving clicks, conversions, and revenue.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Create landing page visuals, banners,
 graphics, and other DTC marketing assets

- Edit and optimise website product images

- Develop new creative concepts and designs based on performance data and brand direction

- Produce variations of winning creatives for testing (different headlines, layouts, visuals, offers)

- Collaborate effectively with the Copywriter to iterate based on performance insights

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve angles, messaging, and hooks

- Monitor competitors’ designs to identify gaps or opportunities

- Upskill on DTC creative trends and platform best practices



Requirements

- Full-time remote, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Strong visual design fundamentals (layout, hierarchy, typography, color)

- Able to design with e-commerce marketing intent, not just aesthetics

- Comfortable creating multiple variations quickly for testing

- Highly organized, execution-focused, independent

- Skills in Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma (3D jewelry rendering experience is a huge plus)

- Experience with Klaviyo and Shopify

- Basic understanding of DTC copywriting



What We Offer

- Fully remote with competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays (following local PH calendar)

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Graphic Designer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Tell us about your most recent job. What did you mainly work on, what were some challenges you faced, and why did you d
 to leave?

2) Tell us about the tools you used, your process, and results relevant to this role.

3) Share a time you took initiative or solved a problem in your workplace. It doesn’t have to be a formal leadership role, just something you’re proud of.

4) Please submit as much of your portfolio as possible. Submitting more work will help us make a more informed decision. Work can include anything within DTC e-commerce industry, but ideally aligned to the role you are applying for. If you don’t have DTC experience, submit your best work portfolio. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the attached portfolio in question (4) that you are most proud of and answer the questions below. We want to see your ability to clearly explain what you did, your role, your reasoning, and the results of your work. You may optionally pick more than 1 project to highlight additional skills.

- What the project was

- Your specific contribution

- Why you approached it this way

- The results or impact (if any)



Keywords

jewelry graphic designer, e-commerce graphic designer, DTC graphic designer, performance creative,
 ads creative,
 ads designer, meta ads creative, meta ads designer, DTC designer, marketing creative, marketing designer, visual designer, klaviyo, mailchimp, omnisend,
 flow designs,
 campaign designs, lifecycle
 designs

title: Video Editor & Thumbnail Artist (Reels + Long-Form YouTube) - Education Niche
description:
About Me & The Vision:

I run an elite, high-performance HSC (High School) Mentorship program based in Australia. We don't do boring, traditional tutoring. We help stressed, overwhelmed Year 12 students completely rebuild their study systems so they can dominate their final exams, get top ranks, and get into their dream university courses.



My vision is to become the #1 authority for high school students in Australia. I have the content and the organic funnel, but I need a killer editor to take my raw footage and make it highly engaging, fast-paced, and professional.



The Role:

I batch-record my content, so I need someone reliable to handle a weekly cadence. Each week, you will be responsible for editing:



1 x Long-Form YouTube Video (approx. 8-15 minutes) + 1 High-Click-Through-Rate Thumbnail.



5 x Short-Form Reels/TikToks (approx. 45-60 seconds each) cut from the long-form or from separate raw footage.



What I'm Looking For:



- You understand pacing, pattern interrupts, and retention editing (Alex Hormozi / Ali Abdaal style, but tailored to my brand).



- You can create clean, high-quality thumbnails that actually get clicks.



- You are fluent in English and can add accurate, dynamic captions.



- You communicate well and hit deadlines reliably.



How to Apply:

I will be shortlisting 1-3 candidates for a quick interview. To be considered, please reply with:



1. Your Portfolio: Links to previous short-form reels and long-form YouTube videos you have edited.



2. Why Me?: A brief paragraph on why you want to work for an education/mentorship brand like mine based on the vision above.



3. The Test: Let me know if you are willing to edit one short 1min (final length) clip as a test trial so I can see your specific style (paid if successful).



4. Attention to Detail: Please put the word "EDUCATE" in the subject line of your application so I know you actually read this.

title: Video Editor & Translator for E-commerce Ads
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce business expanding into new markets and marketing channels.



We are looking for a video editor who can translate and adapt English advertisement videos into Italian for Meta Ads.



The videos are very simple and short, usually between 30 seconds and 2 minutes, and mainly require translation, voiceover generation, and light editing.



You will be working regularly with AI tools such as ElevenLabs, Vmake, and Higsfield to help create localized ad content for the Italian market.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone reliable who wants to grow with a scaling e-commerce brand.



What You Will Do



• Translate English video scripts into Italian

• Generate Italian voiceovers using ElevenLabs

• Edit and adapt advertisement videos for the Italian audience

• Add subtitles or text overlays when needed

• Sync visuals with the voiceover pacing

• Work with short videos (30 seconds – 2 minutes)



Tools You Will Use



You will regularly work with:



• ElevenLabs (voiceovers)

• Vmake (video editing)

• Higsfield (static creatives)



Requirements



• Basic video editing skills

• Ability to translate English to Italian naturally

• Familiarity with AI tools like ElevenLabs

• Attention to detail

• Reliable internet connection



Compensation & Schedule



• $5–$7 per hour depending on experience

• 20–40 hours per week

• Long-term position

• Opportunity for raises based on performance



How to Apply



To make sure you read the full job description, include the word:



**“PIZZA”**



in your application.



Please send:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Any video editing work or portfolio

• Your experience with ElevenLabs or similar tools

• Your weekly availability

title: video editor
description:
Looking for a short-form video editor to help me create viral podcast clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. I’ll provide timestamps and ideas — you just handle the edit. I’ll give bonuses if your videos perform well. You must have experience making TikTok-style edits, deliver within 1–2 days, and know what makes content pop. If you’re interested, apply and include your RESUME with your

title: (Use ChatGPT) Travel Research & Logistics Assistant (US Multi-City Trip Planning)
description:
5,000 PHP Job - Easy, finish at your own speed!



Job Overview



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Travel Research & Logistics Assistant to help plan and execute a multi-city business trip across the United States.



This role is AI-driven and research-focused. You will work alongside ChatGPT and other AI tools to produce a complete travel execution plan that includes:



• flights

• hotels

• transportation

• business events

• schedules

• booking links

• cost comparisons



The final output will be a clean master document with everything organized and ready to book.



Once the plan is complete, you will also help execute bookings and logistics.



This is not creative writing.

This is structured research, organization, and execution.



Project Overview



The founder is taking a business trip across the United States from April 16 ? May 27.



The trip will likely include:



• Washington DC

• New York City

• Miami

• Nashville (short stop)

• Los Angeles

• San Diego

• San Francisco



The trip is focused on:



• attending business events

• networking with founders

• producing business content

• meeting potential customers



Your job is to help design and organize the best route, hotels, and flights while maximizing:



• value for money

• comfort

• safety

• efficiency



What You Will Do



Using ChatGPT and other AI tools, you will:



1. Travel Research



Research and organize:



• flights between cities

• train options (Amtrak etc.)

• airport comparisons

• travel timing

• route efficiency



Provide real prices and booking links.



2. Hotel Research



Find high-quality hotels only.



Rules:



• 4-star hotels preferred

• really nice 3-star hotels acceptable

• no cheap hotels

• no hostels

• no shared housing

• no rooms in someone’s house



Provide:



• hotel name

• neighborhood

• nightly price

• review score

• booking link

• pros / cons



3. Business Event Research



Using the event calendar we provide, identify:



• valuable conferences

• founder networking events

• SaaS / startup events

• cybersecurity events

• GTM / sales events



Evaluate:



• who attends

• networking value

• relevance to our business



4. Master Travel Plan Document



Create a clean master planning document that includes:



• full trip route

• city dates

• travel segments

• hotel options

• flight options

• booking links

• cost comparisons

• recommended final plan



Everything must be organized in one place.



We should be able to open the document and book the entire trip immediately.



5. Booking Execution



Once approved, help:



• book flights

• book hotels

• organize confirmations

• track receipts

• organize itinerary



Tools You Must Be Comfortable With



You must be comfortable using:



• ChatGPT

• Google Docs

• Google Sheets

• Google Flights

• 

• airline websites

• research tools



This role is AI-assisted research.

You must know how to use AI to work faster and smarter.



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• is extremely organized

• loves research

• is detail oriented

• is comfortable using AI tools

• enjoys planning travel logistics

• is proactive and fast



Bonus if you have experience with:



• executive assistant work

• travel planning

• event research

• logistics coordination



Output Standard



Your final deliverable should look like a professional travel operations document, including:

title: Video Agency VA
description:
The Role

We are looking for a sharp, dependable, and highly organized Virtual Assistant to join our core team. You will work directly alongside the Agency Owner and Client Success Manager to keep agency operations running smoothly. Your job is to take be deligated with tasks off the Owner's plate — so they can stay focused on strategy and growth — while ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



This is not a passive role. We need someone who is proactive, communicates clearly, and can be trusted to execute tasks independently and on time, every single day.



What You'll Do

Mon-Friday 9-5 Pacific Standard Time

Backend Systems & Documentation

Build and maintain internal workflows, SOPs, and process documents

Organize and manage Google Drive file structures, slack channels, dropbox, zapier, etc for HRW Media and clients

Create templates, reference documents, and operational infrastructure



Automations & Integrations

Build and manage automations using Zapier and similar tools

Connect platforms to reduce manual, repetitive work

Troubleshoot broken automations and document all workflows built



Task Execution & Support

Complete same-day task assignments from the Agency Owner — reliably and accurately

Assist with any virtual tasks currently on the Agency Owner's plate

Flag blockers immediately and ask questions before making assumptions



Daily Reporting

Submit a detailed end-of-day (EOD) report in Slack every working day

Break down each hour of your workday — what you worked on and its status

Keep all task updates and communications in the #va-channel



Who We're Looking For

The ideal candidate is someone who takes real pride in their work. You don't need to be reminded twice. You meet deadlines, communicate proactively, and write with clarity and confidence.



Must-Have Qualities

Excellent written English — clear, professional, and polished with zero errors

Highly responsive — replies to messages within 1 hour during work hours

Self-motivated and reliable — no micromanagement required

Strong attention to detail — organized, accurate, and thorough

Proactive communicator — you flag problems early, not at end-of-day

Comfortable working independently across multiple tasks and tools



Required Skills & Experience

Proficient with Google Workspace: Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail

Experience with Zapier or similar automation/no-code platforms

Experience building SOPs, workflows, or process documentation

Strong organizational skills — you keep files, folders, and tasks clean and consistent

Minimum 2 years of experience in a VA, operations, or administrative role



Bonus (Not Required)

Experience with Monday.com for project and task management

Familiarity with Slack for team communication and workflow coordination

Hands-on experience with Go High Level (GHL) — CRM, automations, pipelines

Background working with marketing or creative agencies

Experience supporting a founder or business owner directly



We read every application carefully. To be considered, please send the following to 



A brief introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

2–3 specific examples of backend systems, automations, or SOPs you have built

A short writing sample (3–5 sentences) explaining why you're a great fit for this role

Your availability and time zone

Your expected monthly rate (in USD)

title: Real Estate Transaction Manager/ Listing Coordinator
description:
PLEASE READ FULL DESCRIPTION AND FOLLOW APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS FOR CONSIDERATION



ABOUT US:

We are currently seeking 1-2 motivated and experienced Real estate Listing Manager/ Transaction Coordinator professionals as a dedicated hi-level support staff  for our Real Estate Team.  This is a full time position and the intention is for this to be a long term role.  Our current support staff have all been with us 3+ years.  



JOB OVERVIEW:

This position requires an experienced and highly skilled candidate who will primarily focus on supporting the real estate transaction process, ensuring smooth and timely closings. Previous Listing coordinator and MLS experience and in depth knowledge of the contract to close process is REQUIRED. Please do not apply if you do not have high level, hands on Listing and Transaction management experience. We are not looking fort general support.  Experience with eXp Systems is a plus. You’ll also provide general administrative support. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who is detail-oriented, highly organized, and looking to grow in the real estate industry.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Transaction Management: Oversee and support the full real estate transaction process from contract to closing, including coordinating timelines, documents, and communication between agents, clients, and other parties.

- MLS Listings: Create and manage property listings on Multiple Listing Services (experience with OneKey/HGAR MLS is a plus)

- Property Descriptions: Write compelling and accurate property descriptions to showcase listings.

- Administrative Support: Assist the with tasks such as managing
 inquiries, organizing documents, and scheduling appointments.

- Social Media & Content Creation: Post and create content for listings  on social media platforms.

- Client and Partner Outreach: Manage outbound calls, texts and
s to agents, attorneys, lenders and clients to assist in deal follow ups and transaction management



LOOKING FOR:

- Minimum 1 year of real estate experience, preferably with eXp Realty systems like SkySlope.

- Previous direct support of top producing listing agents managing listings from start to finish.

- In depth understanding of the Real Estate transaction contract to close process

- Experience with managing and responding to communications on behalf of CEO

- Ability to manage 20+ transactions at once and keep track of changing status and priorities. 

- Strong proficiency with Google Drive, MLS, CRM, Canva and eXp tools.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

- Highly organized, quick thinking and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.

- A positive, team-oriented attitude with a strong desire to grow and succeed in the real estate industry.

title: eCommerce Business Manager
description:
Own Category Growth, Optimize Performance, and Expand Market Dominance.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Business Manager to take full ownership of a multi-million dollar product category, with Amazon as the primary growth channel. This is a high-impact role for a results-driven e-commerce operator who thrives on ownership, accountability, and driving measurable growth through disciplined execution and data-backed decision-making.



While this role operates deeply within Amazon, we welcome candidates who have driven growth across e-commerce, DTC, or marketplace environments and are excited to apply that experience within a scaled Amazon ecosystem.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs:

We believe performance comes from strong systems executed consistently.



Every eCommerce Business Manager is expected to progress through three stages:



- Learn the Playbook – Understand our category strategy, operating standards, and decision frameworks

- Apply the Playbook – Execute accurately and consistently to deliver predictable, scalable results

- Enhance the Playbook – Improve systems with new ideas and strategies after mastery is demonstrated



This order matters. We value innovation, but only when it is grounded in proven execution. Our playbook exists to help high performers win faster, create leverage, and scale impact — not slow them down.

title: Senior Video Editor
description:
As a Senior Video Editor, you will be a key member of our creative team, responsible for crafting high-quality video content that brings properties, energy initiatives, and environmentally focused projects to life.



This role requires exceptional editorial judgement, including the ability to select the right footage, shape strong narratives, and edit with purpose to tell compelling visual stories. You will work closely with our videographers and marketing team, collaborating primarily through Adobe Premiere Pro, to deliver engaging, emotionally resonant video content that aligns with both brand strategy and client objectives.



Strong skills in 3D motion design, visual effects, and VFX design are essential, enabling you to elevate content beyond standard editing and create polished, cinematic results.



Key Responsibilities

Video Editing and Narrative Construction

Edit and refine video content including property showcases, energy and environmental campaigns, client testimonials, and event coverage.



Carefully assess and select footage to build clear, compelling stories with strong narrative flow.



Post-Production Excellence

Deliver high-end post-production including colour grading, audio mixing, motion graphics, 3D animation, and visual effects.



Create visually striking VFX and motion design using tools such as After Effects, 3D and VFX software, and AI-assisted platforms including Runway.



Storytelling and Creative Direction

Translate creative briefs into engaging visual narratives that enhance emotional impact and brand messaging.



Apply strong pacing, rhythm, and structure to maximise viewer engagement.



Collaboration and Workflow

Collaborate closely with videographers and the wider marketing team using Adobe Premiere Pro as the primary shared editing platform.



Incorporate feedback efficiently while maintaining creative integrity and high production standards.



Creative Development

Contribute innovative ideas, editing styles, and visual approaches to continually raise the quality of output.



Stay up to date with emerging trends in video storytelling, motion design, and VFX.



AI and Automation

Explore and implement AI tools to improve efficiency, enhance creativity, and streamline post-production workflows.



File and Asset Management

Maintain organised project files and a structured video asset library to support collaborative workflows.



Requirements

Proven experience in professional video editing and post-production, supported by a strong portfolio demonstrating storytelling, narrative editing, and advanced visual work.



Excellent ability to choose the right footage and edit it into a compelling, coherent story.



High proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, which is essential for team collaboration.



Advanced skills in After Effects, 3D motion design, and VFX design.



Strong understanding of colour correction, audio design, composition, and cinematic pacing.



Exceptional attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.



Strong communication skills and confidence working collaboratively within creative teams.



A passion for innovation, creativity, and pushing visual storytelling to a higher standard.



A degree or diploma in film production, media, or a related field, or a minimum of three years’ relevant professional experience.

title: Senior Graphic Designer (Remote)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a Senior Graphic Designer to join our team and help bring our brands to life through high-quality visual design.



This role is ideal for someone with strong experience in the food & beverage or hospitality industry who can create visually compelling assets that work both in-store and across digital platforms.



You will work closely with the marketing team and report to the Group Brand & Marketing Manager, designing packaging, menus, brochures, motion graphics, and other brand materials, while ensuring consistency and strong creative standards across all brand touchpoints.



This is a full-time role (30–38 hours per week) with a Sydney (NSW)-based hospitality group comprising 5 brands and over 50 locations across Australia.



This role requires exclusive commitment, meaning you are expected to work only with our company as your single client during working hours.



Key Responsibilities

You will be managing a Junior Graphic Designer and working with a marketing team of 5–7 people.



Responsibilities include:



Design and develop packaging, menus, brochures, and marketing materials



Create engaging visual assets for print, digital platforms, and social media



Maintain and strengthen brand consistency across all creative outputs



Develop motion graphics and short-form video content for marketing campaigns and digital platforms



Work closely with marketing and operations teams to support campaigns and promotions



Prepare final artwork for production and print, managing the process from brief through to execution (including internal approvals, supplier coordination, and obtaining quotes)



Manage and mentor the Junior Graphic Designer



Contribute creative ideas to elevate the visual identity of the brands



Maintain clear communication with the team, with strong written and verbal English skills



Must-Have Requirements

5+ years of professional experience in graphic design



Previous experience in the Food & Beverage and/or Hospitality industry



Strong experience in packaging design



Strong experience designing layouts such as menus, brochures, and marketing materials



Strong understanding of brand storytelling through visual design



Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)



Excellent written and verbal English communication skills



A strong portfolio demonstrating relevant design work



Bonus Skills

Experience with motion graphics and video editing (After Effects or similar tools)



What We’re Looking For

title: Research, Design & Marketing Manager
description:
Ethics Insight is a specialist advisory firm that helps impact investors uncover hidden integrity risks and protect value in high-stakes deals. We’re looking for a Research, Design & Marketing Manager to support our founder, Rupert Evill, with targeted marketing (to gain access to clients, podcasts, awards, and speaking opportunities, content ideas, supporting our Substack management, etc.), design (Canva, templates, pitch decks, website knowledge a bonus), and research (knowledge management).



This is not a generic admin role. We need someone curious, detail-oriented, and proactive. We need someone who can keep the marketing and design ticking (driving it) while also helping structure knowledge (e.g., identifying client or speaking opportunities, themes for social media, finding gaps).



Who this job is for:

This role suits someone curious about risk, behaviour, and how organisations really work. If you enjoy spotting patterns, organising ideas, and helping turn thinking into influence (content, podcasts, models), you’ll enjoy this role.



Your mindset:

1. Curious about how people and organisations behave

2. Comfortable working independently and proposing improvements

3. Enjoys turning messy ideas into clear structures

4. High integrity and discretion



Responsibilities:

- Research target podcasts, clients, awards, social media strategies and platforms for submissions

- Draft & manage application materials, profiles, and supporting documents

- Design templates (for reports, pitch decks, social media, etc.)

- Organise and migrate content (e.g., social media posts and blogs to Substack) and flag key themes

- Organise knowledge resources

- Provide activity updates via Google Sheets

- Ad hoc support: scheduling, social media research, website or design inputs (nice-to-have)



Requirements:

- We value thinking over speed (human creativity, not AI, as we have an AI stack and software already).

- If you enjoy spotting patterns and improving systems, this role will suit you.

- If you prefer detailed instructions for every task, this role may not be a good fit.

Technical skills:

- Strong research & organisational skills

- Experience with outreach (podcasts, clients, awards, conference organisers, or client-facing submissions)

- Tools: Google Workspace, Google Sheets, Drive (essential); Canva, WordPress & AI prompting, knowledge base, and agents (nice-to-have)

- Excellent English (UK spelling), concise and low-fluff communication

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable asking questions or suggesting improvements (we're hiring for your brain, and would welcome your perspectives that we may be missing)

- Ability to work independently and respect confidentiality (NDA required)



Schedule & Benefits:

A) ~35 hrs/week, flexible (output is the metric for this role, we will not be 'clock watching', and we will respect your time), with some overlap in UK hours

B) ~$1,100 per month, depending on experience

C) 13th-month pay included

D) Paid PH public holidays & reasonable flexibility for time off

E) Long-term role with potential to expand scope. For example, if, as you learn the business, you are able to bring in new work or new opportunities, you would receive a 20% commission (i.e., potentially doubling or tripling your salary). 



How to Apply:

- Use this subject line: Manager_Research_Design_Ethics_Insight_[Your Name]

- Spend 9 Apply Points when applying. Applications without this will not be considered.

- Answer these questions in your cover letter:

1) What topic or problem genuinely fascinates you? Tell us about something you enjoy researching or learning about, even when you’re not being paid to.

2) Tell us about something you taught yourself recently. What sparked your interest, and how did you approach learning it?

3) Tell us about a time you disagreed with a manager or client but handled it professionally.

4) What is one thing Ethics Insight or Rupert should be doing that we are not?



Next Steps:

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a short, paid trial task: Identify 5 prospective clients and forums where they hang out - e.g., podcasts, conferences, etc.; further details will be provided to the applicants.

title: Media Buyer| FACEBOOK - Dropshipping | META |Shopify - advertising
description:
We are U-S Limited, a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple successful dropshipping stores. Every day, we test 30+ new ad campaigns on
 and Instagram to find high-performing products and scale successful ads.



We are looking for a highly analytical, results-driven, and fast-learning Media Buyer who knows how to read and interpret data, make quick decisions on whether to kill or scale ads, and continuously optimize campaigns.



This is not an agency role. 

You will be running ads exclusively for our own dropshipping stores, working directly with the CEO to drive sales and profitability. Our ads run 24/7, and we test new products daily. We are constantly learning and improving—so we need someone who is eager to adapt, test new strategies, and grow with us.

 



Your Role

As our Media Buyer, your job is to ensure our ad campaigns generate maximum profitability through data-driven decisions, constant testing, and fast adjustments.

• Analyze Data – Continuously track ad performance and make real-time decisions.

• Kill or Scale Ads – Determine which ads should be stopped and which should be scaled based on performance metrics.

• Test Multiple Products Daily – Launch and manage 50+ new ad campaigns every day.

• Audience Targeting – Research and refine high-converting audiences.

• Budget Optimization – Allocate ad spend efficiently for maximum return on investment.

• A/B Testing – Run experiments with different ad creatives and targeting strategies.

• Real-Time Adjustments – Ads are live 24/7, so you must be able to adjust quickly to maintain performance.

• Work Directly with the CEO – Collaborate closely on strategy, decision-making, and campaign optimization.

• Fast Learning & Adaptation – Stay open to learning new methods and improving processes as the landscape evolves.

 



What We’re Looking For

We need someone who is highly analytical, decisive, results-driven, and quick to learn. You should be able to interpret ad performance metrics and take immediate action while continuously improving your skills.

• Proven experience running
 and Instagram ads for 
 brands

• Strong analytical skills – ability to assess data and make fast decisions

• Experience managing high ad volume, launching and optimizing 50+ campaigns per day

• Fast learner – open to adapting, testing, and improving along the way

• Excellent communication – direct collaboration with the CEO, requiring clear and quick responses

• Availability to work 24/7 – ads run non-stop, and quick decisions are critical

• Self-motivated and proactive – you take initiative and make decisions without waiting for instructions

 



What’s in It for You?

• High-performance pay – Your earnings will be directly tied to your results

• Opportunity for rapid growth – If you perform well, you can move into a management role with higher compensation

• Work directly with the CEO – Gain hands-on experience with top-level strategy

• Remote work – Work from anywhere, as long as you are available when needed

• Unlimited earning potential – The better your ads perform, the more you can earn

• A chance to learn and grow – We are all improving every day, and you will have the opportunity to refine your skills and test new strategies

 



How to Apply

To apply, send us:

• Your most successful ad campaign – What made it successful? What key metrics and decisions did you make?

• Proof of success – Can you provide doc sheets, case studies, or any data supporting your past campaign performance?

• Your experience running Meta 
 & Instagram) ads for dropshipping brands (provide us store links/proof)



Fun Challenge: To prove you’ve read the full post, include the word "RED" somewhere in your application.

title: Video Editor
description:
Job Title: Part Time Video Editor for Meta Ads (Trial Project First)



About NOSSA Padel



NOSSA Padel is a premium padel equipment brand based in the UK, selling into Europe and the USA.



We focus on clean design, high performance products and an understated, confident brand feel.

Website: 



The Role



I am looking for a part time video editor to create short form performance ads for Meta,
 and Instagram.



You will be responsible for:



• Turning longer videos into short, scroll stopping visual hooks

• Creating short graphic based ads from still images

• Editing for performance and clarity, not just transitions

• Delivering multiple variations that can be tested for CTR and ROAS



If the work performs well and we work well together, this can grow into a more regular and potentially full time role. I am happy to pay a premium for someone who consistently delivers high quality, high performing creatives.



Communication and Working Style



Clear communication is non negotiable.



• We will agree response times and availability up front

• I cannot work with someone who disappears for hours without notice

• I am straightforward and expect the same in return



If we both commit to clear communication, this can be a long term relationship.



Creative Direction and Inspiration



You must be comfortable working to reference and adapting that style to NOSSA.



Before applying, please look at:



• 
 and their paid ads style and pacing

• Golf equipment brands such as Callaway, TaylorMade, and Titleist



We are also selling equipment, so I want a similar sense of performance, trust and premium feel.



The goal:



• Strong, simple hooks in the first 2 to 3 seconds

• Clean graphics, no clutter or gimmicks

• A premium, confident feel that fits NOSSA, not loud or messy ads



Trial Project



Before committing to ongoing work, you will complete a short trial edit.



We are asking for this because in the past we have invested a lot of time into editors whose work did not meet the level we need for performance ads. The trial is there to make sure we are a genuine fit for each other before any paid ongoing work begins.



For the trial you will receive:



• Raw footage

• An example of a previous edit that did not meet expectations

• Reference ads for creative direction

• A clear brief on the hook, message and desired outcome



You will deliver:



• 1 to 3 ad variations

• A strong, clear hook in the first 3 seconds

• Pacing optimised for Meta performance

• Correct aspect ratios for feed and Reels



If your trial work is strong and aligned with our standard, we will move forward with paid work and discuss an ongoing structure.



What I Am Looking For



• Proven experience editing performance creatives for Meta or TikTok

• Strong understanding of hooks, retention and pacing

• Ability to work with minimal hand holding once direction is clear

• Reliable and responsive communication



How to Apply



Please send:



• 3 examples of short form performance ads you have edited, ideally Meta

• Any performance results if you have them, CTR, CPA, ROAS etc

• Your typical turnaround time for a 30 to 60 second ad

• Your rate structure, hourly or per video



If your style and results fit what we are building at NOSSA, I will send you the trial brief so we can see how we work together.



Team NOSSA

title: Real Estate Acquisitions Manager (Novation)
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Manager who specializes in novation agreements and residential wholesaling. The ideal candidate has a strong background in negotiating with property owners, analyzing residential deals, and converting motivated seller leads into profitable contracts.



This role requires someone who understands creative real estate strategies, particularly novation agreements and wholesale transactions, and can confidently manage deals from lead to contract.



Key Responsibilities



Handle inbound and outbound motivated seller leads for residential properties.



Negotiate purchase agreements with homeowners using wholesaling and novation strategies.



Analyze property values, ARV, repair estimates, and deal profitability.



Build rapport with sellers and guide them through the selling process.



Structure and close novation agreements and wholesale contracts.



Coordinate with dispositions teams and buyers to ensure smooth transactions.



Maintain detailed records of conversations and deal progress in the CRM.



Follow up consistently with leads to maximize deal conversions.



Work closely with marketing and lead generation teams.



Qualifications



Minimum 3 years of experience as a Real Estate Acquisitions Manager or similar role.



Proven experience in residential wholesaling and novation agreements.



Strong negotiation and closing skills.



Deep understanding of ARV, repair costs, and deal structuring.



Experience working with motivated seller leads.



Familiarity with CRM systems (Podio, REI Reply, Salesforce, or similar).



Excellent communication and rapport-building skills.



Ability to work independently and manage a high volume of leads.



Preferred Skills



Knowledge of creative finance strategies in real estate.



Experience working in U.S. real estate investment markets.



Strong objection handling and sales closing ability.



Compensation



Competitive base salary + commission structure



Performance-based bonuses



Opportunity for career growth within a fast-growing real estate investment company

title: Research Analyst - Public Opinion
description:
Remote - Eastern Time Zone - Some weekend hours required



Job description?

***ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE MARKET OR OPINION RESEARCH EXPERIENCE***

**ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXCEPTIONAL ENGLISH PROOFREADING SKILLS***



Are you a passionate and detail-oriented researcher who wants to be a respected member of our team?



We are searching for candidates who:



Have exceptional English proofreading and editing skills for grammar, clarity, and style consistency



Can verify and maintain data accuracy across all stages of the research process



Have an exceptional eye for detail



Exhibit strong initiative/bias to action



Can perform tasks in a fast-paced environment



Work effectively both independently and as part of a team



More about the position:



Quality control: Review all deliverables for grammar, spelling, and formatting accuracy; cross-check data sets to ensure consistency and integrity before client delivery

Quantitative research: Develop comprehensive written reports

Data collection: Program and test surveys to ensure accuracy, sample design, and survey distribution

Data processing and analysis: Analyze research results, code and analyze open-ended responses, work with pivot tables, SPSS, R, or other software

Data visualization: Create visuals for reporting and dashboards (PowerPoint, Canva, Looker Studio, etc.)

Qualitative Research: Manage and analyze focus groups/in-depth interviews, coordinate recruiting, assist in reporting

Participate in client meetings by taking notes, identifying key action steps, understanding client needs, and making presentations



Required qualifications:



At least one year of market or opinion research experience

A bachelor’s degree or higher

Proven English proofreading and editing ability

Experience with data quality checks and error detection in research outputs

Strong communication skills



What we provide:



A supportive, inclusive, and collaborative work environment

Opportunities for professional growth and development

Company paid PhilHealth or HMO

13th month

Paid time off



***TO APPLY***

Send a LINK to your resume and LinkedIn

Also, send a note about why you are interested in this position.

WARNING: If you put the job description into an LLM and it just reorganizes the words for your note to us we will reject your application.



Put Research Analyst in subject line

Use 3 apply points



I am Adam Probolsky. I will read your application personally.



This position is available immediately.



About Probolsky Research: We are a woman- and Latina-owned market and opinion research firm working for corporate, election, government, and nonprofit clients.



Other information to help you d
 if you what to apply



We do not hire workers. We hire professionals. If you believe that you should be treated as an equal player in an organization, regardless of where you live, this might be the right position to you.



We need people who can manage up, take initiative, and leave shyness at the door. If you can tell  your boss he/she is wrong, this might be the right position for you.
