title: SEO / GEO Specialist
description:
???? FULL-TIME REMOTE: SEO/GEO Specialist for US-Based Marketing Team ????



Company: Drivers 1st (Remote)



***About the Role:***



Drivers 1st is seeking an experienced, detail-oriented SEO/GEO (Search Engine Optimization/Answer Engine Optimization) Specialist to join our remote Marketing Team on a full-time basis. You will be responsible for developing and implementing strategies to dramatically improve our organic search visibility and maximize the effectiveness of our content across all digital platforms. This is a critical role focused on optimizing our web content for both traditional SEO and modern Answer Engine Optimization (GEO) features, such as featured snippets, voice search, and knowledge panels, to capture high-intent users in the competitive driver recruitment market.



***Key Responsibilities:***



*Strategy and Optimization*

• Develop and execute comprehensive SEO/GEO strategies, including keyword research, content gap analysis, competitive auditing, and technical optimizations.

• Perform regular technical SEO audits on 
 and related sites, identifying and resolving issues related to crawlability, indexation, site speed, and structured data.

• Conduct in-depth keyword research tailored to recruitment, carrier opportunities, and hiring maps to capture driver-specific search intent.

• Optimize website content, meta tags, headers, images, and internal linking structures to enhance organic rankings.



*Content and Performance*

• Collaborate with the content team to ensure all new recruiting scripts, job descriptions, and web pages are created with SEO/GEO best practices in mind.

• Monitor, track, and report on key KPIs (organic traffic, rankings, CTR, conversions) using Google Analytics, Google Search • • • • Console, and proprietary SEO software.

• Analyze search query data to identify opportunities for achieving "Position Zero" (featured snippets) and better serving voice search queries.

• Proactively stay current with search engine algorithm updates, industry trends, and new GEO features.



*Technical and Link Building*

• Develop and manage strategies for acquiring high-quality backlinks and improving overall site authority.

• Ensure proper implementation of schema markup and other structured data formats.

• Manage and monitor all website redirects and error pages.



***Required Qualifications and Skills:***

• Experience: Minimum of 5 years of proven experience specifically managing and executing successful SEO and GEO campaigns with a proven track record of growing site traffic, backlinks, and ranking keywords.

• Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field preferred.

• Technical Proficiency: Expert-level proficiency with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, Screaming Frog).

• Extensive experience with web analytics platforms (Google Analytics 4) and search console tools (Google Search Console).

• Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript as they relate to SEO best practices and site performance.

• Hands-on experience implementing and troubleshooting various forms of Structured Data (Schema Markup).

• GoHighLevel experience a plus

• Core Competencies: Exceptional analytical thinking, strong problem-solving ability for technical SEO issues, excellent communication skills, and meticulous attention to detail.

• Adaptability: Must be able to quickly adjust strategies in response to algorithm changes.



***Work Environment Requirements (Non-Negotiable):***

• Internet: Fast and reliable internet (minimum 100mbps) and a backup internet solution.

• Power: Backup generator capable of powering computer equipment for 8 hours in case of power outage.

• Workstation: Quiet, professional workspace free from background noise.

• Equipment: Noise-canceling microphone/headset, camera capabilities for internal meetings, and a capable smartphone.



How to Apply:

Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply by submitting their resume to 
 include "SEO/GEO Specialist Application" in the subject line.

Thank you!

title: Tik Tok, Youtube, Instagram  Short Form Music Video Editor
description:
We're looking for a video editor to create short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) for a US-based electronic music artist who produces house and techno.



What You'll Do:

Edit raw video footage into 7–12 second clips optimized for short-form platforms. You'll handle creative cuts, transitions, and edits that align with current music and platform trends. You'll also log into Instagram to save drafts and post directly to YouTube Shorts. Due to geofencing, you will not need to post on TikTok — we handle that on our end.



What We're Looking For:

Someone who actually listens to electronic music — house, techno, rave culture — and understands the visual language and trends in that space. You should be comfortable with fast-paced, beat-synced edits and know what performs well on short-form platforms right now.



Experience editing for music artists or creative/music-driven projects is required. General business, self-help, or voiceover-style edits are not relevant here — please only apply if you have music-related work to show.



Details:



Long-term, ongoing role

Flexible schedule — you can batch edit on your own time

Per-video rate (open to discussion since clips are short)

Volume is up to you — edit as many as you'd like as long as quality stays high

Quality and creativity are the top priorities



To Apply:

Send your portfolio with examples of music-related or music artist editing work. Put "Music" in your subject line so we know you read this post.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly analytical US Senior Accountant to support our finance operations, primarily serving US-based entities. This role plays a critical part in ensuring accurate financial reporting, strong internal controls, and timely close processes in compliance with US GAAP.



The ideal candidate is hands-on, process-driven, and comfortable operating in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.



Role Summary

The US Senior Accountant will own key areas of the general ledger, lead month-end close activities, support audit readiness, and partner cross-functionally with Finance, FP&A, and business stakeholders. This role requires strong technical accounting expertise, attention to detail, and continuous improvement mindset.



Key Responsibilities

*General Ledger & Close

Own and manage assigned GL accounts, ensuring accuracy and completeness

Lead monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes for assigned entities

Prepare and review complex journal entries, including:

Accruals and deferrals

Revenue and expense adjustments

Depreciation and amortization

Straight-line rent

Reclassifications

Maintain and reconcile balance sheet accounts with proper supporting schedules

Perform bank reconciliations and investigate reconciling items



*Financial Reporting & Analysis

Prepare monthly financial packages and supporting schedules

Perform flux and variance analysis with clear business explanations

Support management reporting and ad hoc financial analysis

Ensure proper cutoff and period-end accuracy



*Technical Accounting & Compliance

Ensure compliance with US GAAP and company accounting policies

Support implementation and maintenance of internal controls (SOX exposure preferred)

Review transactions for proper accounting treatment

Maintain audit-ready documentation and workpapers

Support external and internal audit requests



*Fixed Assets & Multi-Entity

Manage fixed asset accounting (capitalization, depreciation, disposals, impairment)

Support multi-entity and intercompany transactions and reconciliations

Handle multi-currency accounting and FX gain/loss entries



*Cross-Functional Partnership

Act as Point of Contact (POC) for assigned entities or business units

Partner closely with AP, AR, FP&A, Payroll, and Operations

Collaborate with auditors and external partners

Support finance transformation and system improvements



*Process Improvement

Identify opportunities to automate and streamline accounting workflows

Support initiatives to accelerate the close (e.g., 15-day to 10-day close)

Assist in documenting accounting policies, SOPs, and onboarding materials

Contribute to ERP and system optimization projects



Required Skills & Qualifications

Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or Finance

Strong working knowledge of US GAAP (required)

Minimum 4–6 years of progressive accounting experience

Demonstrated ownership of month-end close

Hands-on experience with NetSuite or large ERP systems (required)

Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, etc.)

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

High attention to detail and strong organizational ability

Ability to work independently and meet tight deadlines

Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Preferred Qualifications

CPA or equivalent certification (strong advantage)

Public accounting background (Big 4 or mid-tier preferred)

SOX/internal controls experience

Experience supporting US-based companies

Multi-entity and multi-currency environment exposure

Experience in high-growth or PE-backed environments

Exposure to AU or Singapore entities (nice to have)



Application Instructions

To be considered for this position, please submit the following:

*Your application letter

*Unrestricted link to your updated resume/CV



Subject Line:

USSrAcct – YOUR FULL NAME



Only applicants who meet the required qualifications will be contacted.

title: Accounting Talent Pool (GL Accountant | Senior Accountant | Accounting Manager)
description:

If you are looking to work in a dynamic, multi-entity, and internationally exposed accounting environment, this is an opportunity to be considered for future roles aligned with your experience level.

Who This Pool Is For



We are looking for professionals who want to grow and contribute within:

• Global accounting operations

• Multi-entity environments

• Cross-border reporting structures

• High-performance finance teams



This pool includes potential roles such as:

• GL Accountant

• Senior Accountant

• Accounting Supervisor / Team Lead

• Accounting Manager



Role Overview

Depending on the client requirement and your experience level, you may take on either:

? Execution-focused responsibilities

? Oversight and leadership responsibilities

? Close ownership and reporting roles



You will support organizations that value accuracy, accountability, and process improvement.



Key Responsibilities

(May vary depending on level)



General Ledger & Close

• Manage and maintain accurate general ledger records

Accruals

Deferrals

Depreciation

Amortization

Reclassifications

Multi-Entity & Global Support

• Support cross-functional finance operations



Process Improvement

• Contribute to improving close timelines

• Support documentation of accounting workflows



Senior / Manager-Level Responsibilities

For more experienced professionals:

• Support accounting policy implementation

• Partner with Finance leadership

• Coordinate accounting deliverables across teams



Experience Levels We Welcome

• 3+ years – Accountant Level

Required Qualifications

title: EXPERIENCED SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexi Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflow

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Social Media and Marketing Virtual Assistant
description:
IF YOU SEND A GENERIC MESSAGE AND DO NOT FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED!!.



Hey there! A fast-growing e-commerce brand is looking for a motivated Social Media and Marketing Associate. Think you’ve got what it takes? Keep reading!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

* Manage AND GROW our social media accounts (Instagram and TikTok mainly). This isn’t just about uploading content—you’ll be responsible for growing our audience and boosting engagement.

* Create engaging posts and reels. We have tons of content you can use and repurpose to craft attention-grabbing social media content.

* Use AI tools to repurpose lifestyle images and videos (e.g., changing faces/people using our product, swapping backgrounds, etc.). You can work with the tools we’ve been using or introduce new ones you’re familiar with [you’ll be trained but previous experience on this will be highly valuable].?

* Use AI tools to create videos for socials and ads.

* Manage influencer collaborations: Analyze, select, and handle communications with influencers. Follow up, arrange samples, and track their content and performance.

* Include the word ‘honesty’ in the subject of your application. Yes, I'd like to make sure you're actually reading. You will be ignored if you don’t do this.

* Edit and create visuals as needed for: Amazon listings, Shopify pages, Special occasions (e.g., Black Friday/Cyber Monday, Christmas, Valentine’s Day, Mother’s/Father’s Day).

* Build Ad creatives for Amazon and social media platforms based on provided instructions.

* Other content/marketing related tasks.



REQUIREMENTS:

* Proactive attitude (yes, it’s a cliché, but we truly mean it!).

* Proven experience in growing social media accounts.

* Advanced graphic design skills.

* Video editing skills (suitable for reels and ads—nothing overly complex).

* Experience using various AI tools (you will still receive training)

* Advanced English proficiency (both written and spoken).

* Sharp and fast learner.



SOFTWARE PROFICIENCY:

In your application, rate your experience with the following softwares from 1 to 10 (1 = no knowledge, 10 = very experienced):



(Note: Experience with all of these tools is NOT mandatory; we’re just assessing your overall skill set — so be honest)



- Canva

- Sora 2

- Krea

- Adobe Photoshop

- Photocrack

- CapCut

- Vividly

- Veo 3

- EdgeFX?

- Nano Banana

- Adobe Premiere Pro



SALARY:

$700 per month



HIRING PROCESS:

* Initial chat interview (via Slack or?
).

* Zoom interview.

* Zoom interview with the founder.

* Pre-hiring test for shortlisted candidates (a small task).

* Part-time trial period (usually a few weeks) to see if we’re a good fit for each other.

* Full-time onboarding.



If you’re interested in joining an awesome, result-oriented e-commerce startup with growth & promotion opportunities, I’d love to hear from you!



Tell me why you think you’re the right candidate for this role and direct your message specifically to this job post.

title: DTC Email Designer
description:

This role is ideal for someone who is creative but performance-aware — someone who understands that good design is not just about aesthetics, but about driving clicks, conversions, and revenue.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Develop new creative concepts and designs based on performance data and brand direction

- Produce variations of winning creatives for testing (different headlines, layouts, visuals, offers)

- Collaborate effectively with the Copywriter to iterate based on performance insights

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve angles, messaging, and hooks

- Monitor competitors’ designs to identify gaps or opportunities

- Upskill on DTC creative trends and platform best practices



Requirements

- Full-time remote, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Strong visual design fundamentals (layout, hierarchy, typography, color)

- Able to design with e-commerce marketing intent, not just aesthetics

- Comfortable creating multiple variations quickly for testing

- Highly organized, execution-focused, independent

- Skills in Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma (3D jewelry rendering experience is a huge plus)

- Experience with Klaviyo and Shopify 

- Basic understanding of DTC copywriting 



What We Offer

- Fully remote with competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays (following local PH calendar)

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "DTC

 to leave?

title: [URGENT] Full Stack Web Developer - EST Timezone

Front-end proficiency: HTML, CSS, JavaScript. 



Experience maintaining live production systems. 



Comfortable working with legacy codebases. 



Evidence of shipping and maintaining applications. 



Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving skills. 



Technical maturity and adaptability to adopt AI-assisted coding tools. 



Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Preferred / Plus Skills

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Social Media – Beauty Content)
description:
**About the Role**



Looking for a reliable video editor to support ongoing social media content for a beauty professional.



This is an **ongoing freelance role**, not full time. Some weeks are busier depending on events, classes, and travel schedules.



The goal is to build a **long-term working relationship with a dependable editor** who can deliver clean, polished edits with fast turnaround. Use four when applying.



---



**Type of Content**



Content includes:



* Hairstyling demonstrations

* Behind-the-scenes event footage

* Educational beauty tips

* Event recap videos

* Occasional longer horizontal videos

* Speaker Videos



Most projects will be:



* Instagram Reels / TikTok (vertical 9:16)

* Occasionally horizontal videos (YouTube or web)



---



**Editing Style (Important)**



Premade templates should **not** be used.



The editor should be able to:



* Remove dead space and tighten pacing

* Add **clean captions**

* Use subtle zoom cuts if needed

* Keep the focus on **the work and technique**

* Maintain a **clean, professional look**



Please **do not add stock footage or b-roll unless specifically requested.**



---



**Requirements**



* Experience editing short-form social media videos

* Comfortable working with **both vertical and horizontal footage**

* Able to follow direction and match reference examples

* Strong attention to detail (fonts, captions, pacing)

* **Fast turnaround when needed (24–48 hours preferred)**



---



**Software**



Any professional editing software is fine, including:



* CapCut

* Premiere Pro

* Final Cut

* or similar



---



**Hours & Pay**



Ongoing freelance work.



Typical workload: **5–15 hours per week depending on the season.**



Some weeks may be light while event weeks may require faster turnaround.



**Pay range:** $6/hour depending on experience.



---



**How to Apply**



Please include:



1. Links to **3–5 videos you edited**

2. What software you use

3. Your typical turnaround time

4. Your internet speed



Applicants may be asked to complete a **short paid editing test.**



**Application Question**



In one or two sentences:



What is important to pay attention to when editing beauty content?

title: Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Overview

We are seeking a high-energy, execution-focused Outbound Sales Representative to join the team at Earthside Farms. Based in New York City, we are a "better-for-you" snack brand offering clean-label candied nuts and organic dried mangoes to major distributors and retail partners.



This is a pure execution role with high activity, clear metrics, and no fluff. You will be responsible for high-volume prospecting to engage cold leads, re-activate stalled accounts, and drive reorders from existing customers.



Work Structure & Requirements

Location: Remote (Must have a quiet, professional calling environment).

Schedule: Full-time, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

Requirement: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure total focus on hitting daily activity targets.

Tech Needs: Reliable high-speed internet and strong computer literacy to multitask across sales tools.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Outreach: Execute high-volume outbound
s and daily cold calls to prospects and warm leads.

Account Management: Follow up with inactive accounts and call current customers to facilitate reorders, expansion, or reactivation.

Lead Response: Respond promptly to all inbound calls and
 inquiries.

CRM Discipline: Log all activity accurately in Salesforce, maintaining clean data and clear next steps for every lead.

Performance: Consistently hit daily activity targets and monthly pipeline goals.



Required Skills & Experience

Sales Background: Prior experience in outbound sales, inside sales, or lead generation.

Communication: Fluent English (reading, writing, and speaking) with the ability to write concise, non-spammy cold
s.

Phone Presence: Confident, natural delivery on the phone—no monotone script reading.

Resilience: Comfortable handling objections, basic discovery, and repetitive outreach.

Efficiency: Fast typing skills and high attention to detail.



Traits We Value

Metrics-Driven: Comfortable being measured by clear KPIs and pipeline creation.

Coachable: Open to feedback and a direct communicator who strictly follows the established sales process.

Reliable: Consistent and self-disciplined in a remote work setting.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video introducing yourself.

title: Head of Operations
description:
Role Purpose:

Own and scale the end-to-end operations platform across Asia (China- and Thailand-centric), covering OEM sourcing, re-pack manufacturing, product development input, inventory, S&OP, and logistics. While this is a senior role, the Head of Operations is expected to remain highly hands-on and execution-oriented, particularly during early-stage setup and scale.

  

Responsibilities:

- Define and own OEM and re-pack manufacturing strategy across China and Thailand?- Source, qualify, contract, and manage manufacturing partners?- Act as operations lead within product development, ensuring feasibility, cost, MOQ, and scalability?- Lead inventory strategy, working capital optimisation, and service-level planning?- Own and run the S&OP process?- Oversee inbound and outbound logistics and landed cost optimisation?- Implement SOPs, KPIs, and operational governance?- Ensure quality, food safety, and regulatory compliance



Operating Style & Expectations:

This is a small-team environment. The Head of Operations must be comfortable operating as both architect and executor, personally driving supplier conversations, solving day-to-day issues, and building processes from first principles. There is limited delegation in the early phases; success depends on personal ownership and bias to action.



Requirements:

- 10+ years in operations, supply chain, or manufacturing leadership?- Deep experience with Asia-based OEM manufacturing (China and/or Thailand essential)?- Experience scaling outsourced manufacturing models?- Strong commercial and cost mindset?- Comfortable operating in ambiguous, fast-moving environments

title: Operations Manager
description:
Role Purpose:

Manage and execute day-to-day operations across OEM and re-pack partners in China and Thailand, supporting product development, inventory flow, S&OP execution, and logistics. The role is highly hands-on and suited to someone who thrives on operational detail and execution.

  

Responsibilities:

- Manage OEM and re-pack manufacturing partners and production schedules?- Support new product development from an operations perspective, including samples and pilots?- Execute inventory planning and replenishment?- Support and execute S&OP plans?- Coordinate international logistics, freight bookings, and documentation?- Track cost, service, and delivery performance?- Maintain operational dashboards and reporting



Operating Style & Expectations:

This is a small, lean team. The Operations Manager must be comfortable taking full ownership of execution, working directly with suppliers, freight partners, and internal stakeholders. The role requires proactivity, resilience, and comfort operating without large support teams.



Requirements:

- 4–8 years in operations, supply chain, or manufacturing?- Experience working with international OEMs and logistics providers?- Exposure to Asia sourcing preferred?- Highly organised, detail-driven, and execution-focused?- Comfortable working across time zones and culture

mbers

title: Experienced Manager -Security Guard Business (We're not looking for a basic VA)
description:
About Us



We are a growing security company committed to professionalism, reliability, and operational excellence. Our services span both front-line security operations and the administrative systems that support them. We’re looking for a highly organized, process-driven Operations Manager to ensure both our backend systems and frontline operations run smoothly and efficiently.



Position Overview



The Operations Manager will be responsible for overseeing and aligning all operational functions of the company—both front end and back end. This role is critical to ensuring structure, accountability, and consistency across teams, systems, and processes.



You will be in charge of building, documenting, and enforcing SOPs and operational guidelines, streamlining software and tools, and ensuring that day-to-day operations are organized, compliant, and running without friction.



This role requires someone who is proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable taking ownership of systems, workflows, and execution.



Key Responsibilities



Operational Oversight



Ensure all front-end (field operations, scheduling, staff coordination) and back-end (admin, systems, reporting) operations are running efficiently



Identify gaps, inefficiencies, or breakdowns in operations and implement corrective solutions



Maintain operational consistency across all departments and teams



Processes, SOPs & Compliance



Create, document, implement, and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and internal guidelines



Ensure policies and procedures are followed consistently



Update SOPs as the company scales or processes evolve



Systems & Software Management



Streamline and manage operational software (scheduling, payroll, CRM-Belfry, task management, reporting, etc.)



Ensure systems are properly set up, organized, and used correctly by all team members



Act as the point person for improving workflows and system integrations



Team Coordination & Accountability



Work closely with leadership to execute operational priorities



Ensure teams are clear on processes, responsibilities, and expectations



Hold teams accountable to operational standards and deadlines



Organization & Continuous Improvement



Keep operational documentation, records, and systems organized and up to date



Proactively suggest improvements to enhance efficiency, communication, and scalability



Ensure “nothing falls through the cracks” operationally



Qualifications



Experience in the Security industry is a must



Proven experience in operations management, preferably in security, facilities, or service-based industries



Strong experience creating SOPs, workflows, and operational documentation



Highly organized with excellent attention to detail



Comfortable managing multiple systems and software tools



Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills



Ability to take ownership and execute independently



What We’re Looking For



A systems-thinker who enjoys structure and order



Someone who sees inefficiencies and fixes them



A dependable leader who ensures operations run smoothly without constant oversight



A professional who understands that strong operations are the backbone of a successful security company



Why Join Us



Key leadership role with real ownership and impact



Opportunity to help build and scale operational systems



Work with a growing company that values structure, accountability, and excellence



To Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief summary of your experience managing operations, systems, and SOPs.

title: Support - Community Moderator (US ET Hours)
description:
About Us



Wand is building the ultimate game companion — an interaction layer that transforms the gaming experience. Our platform empowers millions of gamers to customize and enhance thousands of games through innovative tooling. What began as a passion project for technical gamers has evolved into a movement, with our best-in-class desktop application becoming essential for players worldwide.



We’re not just building software; we’re crafting the future of gaming, where every player can experience games exactly as they want to. We’re creating an entirely new category in gaming technology that will fundamentally change how people play.



Role Overview



We’re looking for a Support - Community Moderator (US ET Hours) who thrives where gamers hang out and genuinely enjoys engaging with players day to day. This role is highly hands-on: you’ll be active in conversations, keeping communities welcoming and constructive while helping us understand what players are experiencing in real time.



Beyond moderation, you’ll act as a community pulse-checker — spotting trends, recurring questions, sentiment shifts, and emerging issues across our channels. You’ll surface insights early, help players feel heard, and ensure the right teams have visibility into what’s happening on the ground.



If you enjoy engaging with gaming communities, have strong 
 moderation experience, and like connecting patterns in conversations to real product or support insights, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

Community Engagement

- Be an active and approachable presence across Wand’s community spaces:

- Engage with players, answer questions, and guide users to the right resources

- Encourage positive discussion and help reinforce a healthy community culture

- Maintain an on-brand voice while adapting tone and style per platform

- Collect player feedback and surface common questions or concerns internally



Primary channels: 
 (primary), Reddit, YouTube, X 
),
, Instagram, TikTok, Trustpilot, forums, Featurebase



Moderation

- Keep community spaces safe, respectful, and constructive:

- Moderate 
 and social channels in line with community guidelines

- Enforce rules consistently (warnings, removals, de-escalation, bans when needed)

- Detect and respond to spam, harassment, impersonation, misinformation, and unsafe behavior

- De-escalate tense or emotional situations calmly and fairly

- Document moderation actions, edge cases, and recurring issues for consistency



Trend Spotting & Insights

- Act as a frontline signal detector for what the community is experiencing:

- Identify recurring questions, pain points, sentiment shifts, and emerging topics

- Spot trends related to releases, outages, pricing changes, feature launches, or policy updates

- Flag issues early before they escalate or spread

- Recommend improvements to FAQs, messaging, or support documentation based on observed patterns



Escalation & Cross-Functional Communication

Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of experience in community moderation or social/community support

- Hands-on 
 moderation experience (required)

- Active PC gamer with a strong understanding of gaming culture and online community dynamics

- Strong written communication skills and sound judgment under pressure

- Experience engaging with users across social platforms and public-facing channels

- Ability to identify qualitative patterns (themes, sentiment, repeated issues) and summarize clearly

- Comfortable handling multiple platforms and switching contexts quickly

- Reliable, self-directed, and consistent in enforcing rules and guidelines



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience moderating Reddit and other social platforms beyond 

- Experience supporting a gaming platform, live service, or software product

- Familiarity with moderation tools, bots, reporting queues, or helpdesk systems

- Experience documenting guidelines, macros, or internal moderation notes

- Familiarity with feedback pipelines (e.g., Featurebase) and turning feedback into insights

- Understanding of best practices for public responses and reputation management



Core Competencies

- Community-First Mindset: Advocates for players while upholding community standards

- Pattern Recognition: Able to spot trends and recurring issues early

- Calm Under Pressure: Handles conflict and heated situations with professionalism

- Clear Communicator: Shares insights and escalations with clarity and context

- Adaptability: Comfortable working across fast-moving platforms and changing priorities



What We Offer

- Work with a team passionate about enhancing gaming experiences

- Competitive compensation package

- Remote work flexibility



How to Apply

Please include examples of your community work. Along with your resume, attach 3 examples of how you’ve communicated with gamers online. This can be:

, social comments, forums, etc.)

- Examples of how you handled: a heated 
nt, a confused user, a bug report, or a feature request

- If sharing screenshots, remove or blur usernames,
s, and any personal info.



Wand is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a diverse and inclusive team. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of background.

title: Appointment Setter – Inbound Lead Follow-Up (Remote)
description:
Appointment Setter – Inbound Lead Follow-Up (Remote)

$500 Base + Performance Bonus



We are hiring a reliable appointment setter to call warm inbound leads from our
 ads. These are HVAC business owners who submitted a form and are expecting a follow-up.



This role is simple and focuses on consistency. You must be able to respond quickly when a new lead comes in, follow a short script, and book a consultation if they qualify.



Requirements:

 • Clear, confident English (easily understood)

 • Comfortable speaking to business owners

 • Able to follow a simple script

 • Calm, steady tone (not robotic)

 • Quiet workspace and headset

 • Stable internet connection

 • Available during U.S. Eastern business hours

 • Fast response time (must call new leads within 2–5 minutes)

 • Looking for a long-term, stable position



(If you need constant supervision or respond slowly to messages, this role is not a fit.)



Job Details:

 • You will follow up with warm inbound leads, not cold calls

 • Calls made through PhoneBurner or similar system (we provide access)

 • Script and short training videos provided

 • Call volume is low (1–5 calls per day, sometimes none)

 • You must log call results and notes

 • Follow-up attempts required if there is no answer



This is an execution-based role. Reliability and consistency are important.



Performance Bonus:

 • $15 for every qualified booked appointment

 • Bonus capped at $100 per month



Pay:

 • $500 per month base salary

 • Up to $100 monthly bonus



Paid Trial (1 Week):



We will select two candidates for a 1-week paid trial ($25).

During the trial, we evaluate:

 • Response speed

 • Tone

 • Script accuracy

 • Call logs

 • Professionalism

 • Ability to follow instructions



One candidate will be selected for the long-term position.

Send a message with:

 1. A 30–45 second voice recording reading the script below

Applications without all items will not be reviewed.

Hi, is this Mickey?



Hey Mickey, this is Mark.



You filled out our
 form about getting more 
 installs, so I’m just calling to follow up.



Did I catch you at a good time?

description:

This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.

 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows

- No prior content marketing experience required, but you must be sharp, creative, analytical, and able to learn fast

 to leave?

Work can include anything within DTC e-commerce industry, but ideally aligned to the role you are applying for. If you don’t have DTC experience, submit your best work portfolio. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

title: Sharp & Reliable Customer Service Representative
description:
We are a fast-growing fitness clothing brand looking for A-Players to join our support team. As we're growing, we expect high ticket volumes and need someone who can stay on top of customer concerns with professionalism, clarity, and speed, without compromising quality. 



You’ll be part of a collaborative and supportive team where your contributions are valued and expected. 



Work Hours:



Full-Time: 40 hours per week



Shift Schedule: Right now, all the tea
mbers are on 9 AM-5 PM PH Time, Monday to Friday, but will change soon as we're looking to make our support team a 24-hour shift rotation. 



Must be available and responsive during shift hours.



Pay Schedule: Your pay will start at $350 on your first month, then will increase to $400 next month. Salary is paid every 2nd of the month via WISE. 



Key Responsibilities:



- Provide top-tier customer support via
 and social media DMs/comments

- Live Chat support will be added in the near future — must be open to this expansion

- Coordinate with suppliers regarding order or product concerns

- Identify and raise trending issues or customer pain points to the operations team

- Ensure all support tickets are resolved within the agreed SLA

- Maintain a calm, helpful, confident, friendly, and professional tone at all times



Requirements:



- Experience with Shopify (must-have)

- Excellent communication skills in English (written and spoken)

- Familiarity with customer support CRMs

- At least 1 year of experience in the E-Commerce customer service industry

- Able to work independently

- Strong sense of integrity, reliability, and accountability



How to Apply:

Please follow these steps carefully. Incomplete applications will not be considered.



- Send a link to your resume

- Include a short video introduction (1–2 minutes max) where you talk about your relevant experience and answer the question, "What is the meaning of success for you?"



Answer the sample customer cases below. Write your responses as if replying to real customer
s (no AI-generated content — we want to assess your writing skills and problem-solving approach)



Sample Customer Messages – Write Responses to All 5:



1. WHERE IS MY ORDER?!! I placed this 3 days ago, and I still haven’t received a tracking number. What’s happening with my order?



2. My item arrived damaged. It has a tear on it, or the seam is not properly sewn.



3. I don’t like the quality of your items! I want to return them for a refund!



4. I want to change the size of the item I ordered. And the shipping address I registered is incorrect. (In this case, the customer's order is already fulfilled)



5. I’m not satisfied with the items and the service I’m getting from you guys!! I will post this to my social media to let other people know about your crap to warn people not to order from your company anymore!! If you don’t give me my money back or I will report you to my bank!!



- To test your attention to detail and that you read the full job post, make the subject line “Hi” in Dutch and address your application to our Operations Manager.



We're looking to hire ASAP. 



Looking forward to your application!





Yan,

Operations Manager

title: Client Support Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Client Support Specialist

Work Schedule: US Hours (EST)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)  

Employment Type: Full-Time / Long Term

Salary Range: USD 700 / Month

Benefit: 10 PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-monthly

Equipment: Self-Provide



Job Summary:



We are looking for a Client Support Specialist who is passionate about helping people and providing exceptional service. The ideal candidate has at least 2 years of phone support experience for international companies, demonstrates strong communication skills, and thrives in a fast-paced, detail-oriented environment.



As a Client Support Specialist, you will handle time-sensitive calls related to ETAs (Estimated Time of Arrivals) and broker communications, ensuring that all interactions follow Wingz’ operational standards and our partnered clients’ protocols.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer and manage inbound and outbound calls from clients, brokers, and partners with professionalism and empathy.

• Provide accurate ETAs and handle broker-related inquiries promptly and effectively.

• Follow strict standard operating procedures (SOPs) based on Wingz and our partnered clients’ service standards.

• Communicate proactively with leadership, dispatch, and other departments to ensure seamless coordination and timely issue resolution.

• Document all conversations and updates accurately in the company database or CRM system.

• Handle all calls with urgency and attention to detail, ensuring each client receives timely and high-quality support.

• Escalate critical or unresolved issues to the appropriate teams when necessary, maintaining clear communication throughout.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by identifying trends, sharing feedback, and suggesting process enhancements.



Qualifications:

• Minimum of 2 years of phone-based support experience for international companies (B2B or B2C).

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills.

• Strong verbal and written communication skills with a professional and empathetic tone.

• Fast learner who adapts quickly to new tools, systems, and client processes.

• Passionate about helping people, especially within healthcare and transportation contexts.

• High energy and enthusiasm, with a positive attitude and team-oriented mindset.

• Ability to work independently while maintaining accountability and accuracy.

• Willingness to work ET hours, including weekends or holidays, depending on operational needs.

description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Full-stack Engineer (Django + React Native)

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, (PH or US Hours)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)

Salary Range: Starts at USD 2,000 - $3,000/ Month

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-Monthly

Benefits: Unlimited PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Equipment: Self-Provided



Job Summary:

As a Fullstack Engineer (Django + React Native) at Wingz, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining backend APIs and mobile application features. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable, scalable, and high-performance software supporting our NEMT platform.

This role requires strong experience in Django/Django REST Framework and at least 1+ year of hands-on experience with React Native.



Key Responsibilities:



Develop and Maintain Web Applications:

• Design, develop, and maintain scalable APIs using Django REST framework

• Write clean, efficient, and reusable code following best practices and coding standards.

• Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications.



Develop and Maintain Backend & Mobile Application

• Design, develop, and maintain scalable APIs using Django and Django REST Framework.

• Build and enhance mobile application features using React Native for iOS and Android.

• Write clean, efficient, and reusable code following industry best practices.

• Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of backend services and mobile applications.



Collaborate with Cross-Functional Teams:

• Work closely with front-end developers, designers, and product managers to implement new features and improve existing ones.

• Participate in code reviews, providing and receiving constructive feedback to ensure code quality.

• Collaborate with DevOps engineers to optimize deployment processes and infrastructure.



Database Management:

• Design and optimize database schemas.

• Write efficient queries and manage database migrations.

• Ensure data integrity and security.



Testing and Debugging:

• Write unit tests and perform debugging to ensure the reliability of applications.

• Troubleshoot and resolve issues in a timely manner.

• Conduct regular performance testing and optimize code for better performance.



Documentation and Technical Support:

• Maintain comprehensive documentation of the codebase and technical processes.

• Provide technical support and guidance to tea
mbers and stakeholders.

• Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends and technologies to continuously improve skills and knowledge.



Requirements:

• Minimum of 5 years of professional experience in web development using Django and Django REST framework.

• Proficiency in Python, Django, and Django REST framework.

• At least 1 year of hands-on experience in React Native mobile development (mandatory requirement).

• Strong understanding of front-end technologies, such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

• Experience with RESTful APIs and web services.

• Familiarity with database systems (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.).

• Knowledge of version control systems, particularly Git.

• Experience with Docker and containerization is a plus.

• Understanding of cloud services (AWS, GCP, etc.) is advantageous.

• Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

• Strong communication and collaboration skills.

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

• Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and methodologies.



Nice to have:

• Experience with front-end frameworks such as Vue.js or React (web)

• Experience with additional mobile frameworks (e.g., Flutter)

title: NEMT Routing Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Job Summary:



The NEMT Routing Specialist plays a critical role in the day-to-day operations of our transportation services. This role involves planning efficient routes, assigning trips to drivers, negotiating trip acceptance, and ensuring schedules run smoothly. Strong presentation and negotiation skills are key to motivating drivers to accept assigned trips and maintaining operational efficiency.



You will work closely with U.S.-based operations staff and drivers to optimize scheduling, improve trip efficiency, and maintain a high standard of service for patients.



 Work Schedule:  US Hours (EST)

 Work Setup:  Remote | Independent Contractor

 Employment Type:  Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity

 Fixed Salary: USD 900/ Month

 Perks:  10 PTO days + HMO (after probation)

 Payout:  Semi-Monthly

 Equipment:  Self-Provided



Key Responsibilities:



• Plan, schedule, and optimize daily transportation routes for NEMT drivers.

• Assign trips to drivers and ensure acceptance through effective communication, presentation, and negotiation.

• Monitor driver schedules and adjust routes as needed for delays, cancellations, or emergencies.

• Communicate with drivers proactively to resolve concerns, provide support, and encourage timely trip acceptance.

• Ensure all trips comply with NEMT regulatory requirements and company policies.

• Maintain accurate records of trips, drivers, and route changes using company software.

• Collaborate with dispatch, operations, and customer support teams to resolve scheduling conflicts.

• Identify opportunities to improve routing efficiency and reduce operational costs.

• Generate reports on route performance, on-time metrics, and driver engagement.

• Provide insights and recommendations to management to enhance overall transportation operations.



Qualifications:



• At least 2 years of experience in routing, dispatch, logistics coordination, or transportation planning (experience with NEMT or U.S.-based operations is a plus).

• Background in sales, customer service, or client engagement is highly preferred to leverage presentation and negotiation skills with drivers.

• Strong English communication skills (verbal and written).

• Ability to motivate and influence drivers to accept trips while maintaining positive relationships.

• Familiarity with routing and mapping software (e.g., Google Maps, Waze, or route optimization tools).

• Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and time management skills.

• Ability to multitask and manage last-minute changes effectively.

• High attention to detail and accuracy in record-keeping.

• Comfortable working with U.S. time zones (EST).

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet workspace suitable for remote work.



Preferred Skills (Optional but Advantageous):



• Prior experience in Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) operations.

• Familiarity with NEMT software platforms.

• Knowledge of U.S. transportation regulations and compliance requirements.

• Experience in data analysis or route optimization strategies.



What We Offer:



• Competitive monthly compensation in USD 

• Performance-based monthly bonus ($
per month)

• Paid training and onboarding

• Long-term and stable remote opportunity

• Opportunity for career growth in operations

title: Video Editor : TikTok or YouTube Platforms
description:
Hiring: TikTok & YouTube Video Editor 



We are actively seeking a skilled video editor with specialized experience in TikTok and YouTube content creation, with a focus on the ecommerce space—specifically product reviews, unboxing videos, and other ecommerce-related content. The ideal candidate excels at crafting high-engagement videos through strategic text layovers and eye-catching visual effects, with a keen understanding of platform-specific trends and audience preferences. This ecommerce-focused content will be the ultimate goal and output for our ongoing projects.



This is a paid position with a reasonable rate that aligns with the quality, complexity, and volume of your output. Compensation will be discussed in detail once we have reviewed your portfolio.



Key Requirements



- Specialized expertise in TikTok and YouTube video editing, with a proven track record of creating ecommerce-focused content (product reviews, unboxing videos, etc.) that drives strong audience engagement.



- Proficiency in designing and integrating text layovers (captions, callouts, trend-related text) and dynamic visual effects to enhance content appeal and retention.



- Strong turn-around time: Ability to deliver polished edits efficiently, with quick turnaround on projects being a significant advantage.



- Easy and effective communication:  Must be responsive, collaborative, and able to clearly understand and execute feedback—smooth communication is non-negotiable.



- Ability to work in the China (Beijing) time zone, with alignment on working hours for communication and project coordination.



Application Instructions:



To apply, please submit the following materials:



- A direct shared link to your video editing portfolio (must showcase TikTok/YouTube work, text layover execution, and engagement-focused effects).



- Links to your social media profiles (any platforms where your edited work is featured, such as your personal TikTok/YouTube channels or client accounts).



- Additional references or supplementary work samples (e.g., client testimonials, case studies of high-engagement videos) are highly valued as a bonus.



We will review all portfolios thoroughly and initiate discussions about rates with shortlisted candidates.



If you are a creative, detail-oriented editor who thrives on creating content that resonates, we’d love to hear from you!



Regards,

Luke

title: Experienced Xero Accountant
description:
Stock2Cash is an Australian, tech-led Start-up in the E-commerce space. We are looking to hire to our core team an individual with a problem solver with a “Can do mentality to join as an account manager.



We are looking for an experienced and reliable accountant with strong Xero expertise to help manage and maintain our financial records as our business continues to grow.



This role requires someone who is comfortable working with high transaction volumes, reconciliations, and integrations, and who can keep our accounts accurate, organised, and up to date. You will work closely with the founder and operations team to ensure financial clarity and efficiency.



Key Responsibilities



-Manage and maintain company accounts in Xero

-Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations

-Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

-Review and maintain accurate financial records

-Prepare financial reports and summaries

-Assist with BAS / GST preparation and documentation (if required)

-Monitor and maintain correct categorisation of transactions

-Ensure all financial data is accurate and up to date

-Support integration of Xero with other platforms and payment systems



Requirements



-Proven experience using Xero in a professional accounting role

Strong understanding of reconciliation and financial controls

-Experience managing medium to high transaction volumes

-Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

-Ability to work independently and communicate clearly

-Reliable and organised with strong follow-through

-Highly Valued Experience

-Working with e-commerce or marketplace businesses

-Experience with payment gateways and platform integrations

-Experience preparing BAS and GST reporting in Australia



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who goes beyond basic bookkeeping and can help keep our financial systems structured, transparent, and efficient as the business grows.



The successful candidate will have the unique opportunity to learn from and influence seasoned entrepreneurs who have built several successful companies. As you take on more responsibility, you will also have the chance to grow financially. Please add 'push boundaries' as your last word in your application or message to show your enthusiasm for this growth opportunity.




  is looking to build a fun, exceptional team, so you can expect to come in with a tonne of support and training. We’re fully set up to support our whole team working from home; we know the only thing scarier than starting a new job is starting a new job remotely, but we’ve got you ;)

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Real Estate Team
description:
Location: Remote

Reports To: Sales Manager / Team Lead

Type: Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Bonus



Job Summary:

We are looking for a proactive and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing real estate team. The SDR will play a key role in generating new business opportunities by engaging potential clients, nurturing leads, and setting qualified appointments for our agent team. This position is ideal for someone who is organized, persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, goal-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prospect and qualify leads through phone calls, text,
, and CRM outreach.

- Respond promptly to inbound inquiries from online platforms, social media, or marketing campaigns.

- Conduct initial needs assessments to understand buyers’ or sellers’ timelines, goals, and motivation.

- Schedule listing or buyer consultation appointments for senior agents.

- Maintain accurate records of leads and activity in the team CRM (e.g., Salesforce).

- Collaborate closely with the marketing and operations teams to optimize lead conversion.

- Track daily activity metrics — calls, texts,
s, appointments set, and conversion rates.

- Follow up with past clients, warm leads, and sphere contacts to generate repeat and referral business.

- Continuously learn about new construction communities, local market trends, and loan products to better engage prospects.



Qualifications:

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills — comfortable engaging with potential clients over the phone and online.

- Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple lead sources simultaneously.

- Prior experience in real estate sales, inside sales, customer service, or telemarketing preferred.

- Familiarity with real estate CRM systems and marketing automation tools is a plus.

- Goal-oriented with a strong sense of accountability and urgency.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

- Qualified appointments set per week/month.

- Lead-to-appointment conversion rate.

- Response time to inbound leads.

- Follow-up consistency and pipeline activity.

- Contribution to overall team closings.

Join Us!

At Axis Homes Realty LLC, we value teamwork, growth, and a client-first mindset. Joining our tea
ans being part of a supportive and collaborative environment where your contributions make a real impact. If you’re passionate about real estate operations and ready to grow your career with a company that values excellence and integrity, we’d love to hear from you!

title: CAD Drafter
description:
Join our fast-growing architectural firm located in the vibrant city of Cupertino CA, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. Specializing in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments, we are a diverse team dedicated to excellence in every project. With an array of services covering the entire real estate spectrum, from land acquisition to property listing, our firm offers a unique environment for growth and learning.



Position Summary



We are seeking a detail-oriented CAD Drafter to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating precise technical drawings and plans using computer-aided design (CAD) software. This role requires strong attention to detail, technical knowledge, and the ability to collaborate with engineers, architects, and project managers to bring designs to life.





Key Responsibilities

Develop and revise detailed technical drawings, blueprints, and schematics using CAD software.

Interpret design specifications, sketches, and notes to produce accurate plans.

Ensure drawings comply with industry standards, codes, and company guidelines.

Collaborate with engineers, architects, and other stakeholders to resolve design issues.

Maintain organized records of drawings, revisions, and project documentation.

Assist in preparing layouts, 3D models, and presentation materials when required.

Review and verify the accuracy of completed drawings before submission.





Qualifications

Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Drafting, Engineering Technology, Architecture, or related field.

Proficiency in CAD software (AutoCAD, Revit, SolidWorks, or similar).

Strong knowledge of drafting standards, construction methods, and technical terminology.

Ability to read and interpret engineering and architectural drawings.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Strong communication and teamwork abilities.

Experience in [industry-specific focus, e.g., mechanical, civil, electrical, or architectural drafting] preferred.





Preferred Skills

Familiarity with Building Information Modeling (BIM).

Experience with 3D visualization tools.

Knowledge of project management software.

Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously.





Fully Remote

 Schedule: 9:00 AM–5:30 PM PST, Monday–Friday (12:00 AM–8:30 AM PH Time)

title: Acquisition Assistant
description:

This role will play a key part in assisting the acquisitions team with day-to-day administrative and operational tasks. 2. Online marketing (social media).

3. Cold Calling

- Respond to all leads in a timely manner to drive business forward.

purchase agreement and other business administration paperwork in advance of real estate transactions.

7. Due diligence for potential deals.
