title: Senior Financial Analyst
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our growing real estate team.  This role will support development and investment decisions by building financial proforma models, analyzing project performance, and preparing reports for management. You’ll work closely with the US-based team on residential and multifamily real estate projects, helping evaluate feasibility, cash flows, and returns.



What You’ll Do

- Build and update Excel-based financial models for real estate development and investment projects.

- Analyze project costs, revenues, and returns (IRR, NPV, ROI, cash flow projections).

- Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and scenario analysis to support decision-making.

- Review market and economic data to ensure financial assumptions are realistic.

- Help prepare investment memos, presentations, and financial reports for management and investors.

- Coordinate with the market research and development teams to align assumptions and projections.

- Track ongoing project performance versus budget and highlight key variances.





Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Mathematics, or any related field.

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel - including financial modeling, formulas, and data analysis.

- At least 2–4 years of experience in financial analysis, investment modeling, or real estate development.

- Understanding of real estate finance concepts (pro forma, IRR, cap rate, yield, absorption, etc.).

- High attention to detail and excellent analytical and quantitative skills.

- Ability to communicate complex financial information clearly.

- Familiarity with real estate markets (especially in the US or Bay Area) is a plus.

- Experience using tools like Microsoft 365 is an advantage.



Preferred Attributes

- Strong interest in real estate investment and development.

- Enjoys working with numbers and models and solving analytical problems.

- Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable in meeting deadlines.



Working Hours

- Required to follow 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time

title: Executive Support Specialist – Licensed Professional Tracks
description:
Executive Support Specialist – Licensed Professional Tracks

Reports to: CEO



Role Overview:

We are seeking highly qualified Attorneys, CPAs, or Licensed Educators to provide strategic executive support to the CEO. This role blends professional expertise with high-level administrative responsibilities, requiring discretion, precision, and proactive initiative.



1. Attorney

Responsibilities:

-Provide strategic support to the CEO in legal and executive matters, managing priorities, correspondence, and follow-ups with minimal oversight.

-Review, draft, and finalize contracts, legal memoranda, and other professional documents with precision and adherence to legal standards.

-Maintain and optimize digital and physical documentation systems for legal, corporate, and operational efficiency.

-Track deadlines, filings, and regulatory obligations across multiple projects to ensure compliance and mitigate risk.

-Coordinate legal meetings, court dates, and executive appointments, anticipating scheduling needs.

-Conduct legal research, prepare briefs, and summarize complex legal information for strategic decision-making.

-Handle confidential and sensitive legal and corporate information with the highest ethical standards.

-Identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement best practices in legal and operational processes.



2. CPA Track

Responsibilities:

-Provide strategic financial and operational support to the CEO, managing priorities, reports, and follow-ups proactively.

-Prepare, review, and analyze financial statements, budgets, forecasts, and professional correspondence with accuracy and compliance.

-Maintain and enhance digital and physical recordkeeping systems to ensure precise financial documentation and reporting.

-Track deadlines, deliverables, and fiscal obligations across multiple projects, ensuring adherence to regulatory and corporate standards.

-Coordinate executive and financial meetings, ensuring seamless scheduling and preparation of supporting materials.

-Conduct financial research, prepare summaries, and provide actionable insights to guide executive decisions.

-Handle sensitive financial and operational information with integrity and discretion.

-Identify and implement process improvements to optimize financial workflows and executive reporting.



3. Licensed Educator Track

Responsibilities:

-Provide high-level executive support to the CEO in education-related and administrative initiatives, managing priorities and deliverables with minimal supervision.

-Draft, review, and prepare professional reports, educational proposals, correspondence, and presentations with clarity and precision.

-Organize and maintain digital and physical records for instructional programs, projects, and operational documentation.

-Track deadlines, projects, and educational initiatives to ensure timely execution and alignment with organizational goals.

-Coordinate meetings, workshops, and events with internal teams, stakeholders, and educational partners.

-Conduct research, analyze educational trends, and prepare concise summaries to support informed strategic decisions.

-Handle sensitive educational and organizational information with professionalism, confidentiality, and ethical integrity.

-Identify opportunities to improve processes, workflows, and operational efficiency within the educational context.

title: VA Accountant
description:
We are looking for a VA Accountant with experience in U.S. tax accounting to prepare and review individual and business tax returns, ensure IRS compliance, and support tax planning and financial reporting. The role requires strong knowledge of QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently in a remote setting while collaborating with the finance team during PST business hours.



Responsibilities:

-Prepare and review tax returns for individuals and businesses.

-Ensure all filings meet U.S. tax regulations and requirements.

-Assist in tax strategy development to boost financial efficiency.

-Stay on top of tax law changes and conduct research as needed.

-Support financial reporting for audits and tax-related documentation.

-Collaborate with the finance team to manage inquiries and ensure smooth operations.

-Keep accurate and organized financial records.



Qualifications:

-Proficiency in QuickBooks and SAGE Intacct is a must; CPA certification is a big plus.

-Solid experience in U.S. tax accounting (corporate & individual).

-Familiarity with tax software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAGE).

-Strong knowledge of IRS regulations and tax compliance.

-Detail-oriented, with excellent problem-solving skills.

-Strong communication skills (written & verbal).

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines in a remote setting.

-3-5 years of relevant experience in tax accounting (preferred)

title: Video Editor & Social Media Content Support (Part-Time ? Full-Time Potential)
description:
I am looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines who can help edit videos and prepare content for multiple social media platforms.



This role will start part-time but may grow into a full-time position if we work well together.



I am building several social media brands focused on topics such as:



Direct sales / affiliate marketing



Artificial intelligence



entrepreneurship



family and lifestyle



sports



Because the topics vary, the video style and tone will vary, so I need someone who is flexible, coachable, and able to follow detailed instructions.



Important: Please Read Carefully



Most applicants do not read the job description fully.



To apply for this position you must follow the instructions in this post exactly.



Applications that do not follow the instructions will not be reviewed.



Responsibilities



Your primary responsibilities will include:



Video Editing



Edit short videos recorded on iPhone or screen recordings



Trim footage and remove mistakes or pauses



Add captions, text overlays, and simple graphics



Add basic transitions and jump cuts



Maintain a consistent editing style once it is established



Match the tone of different content topics



Social Media Formatting



Videos must be formatted correctly for:



Instagram Reels



TikTok



YouTube Shorts



YouTube Long Form






Ideally, videos should be edited once and usable across multiple platforms whenever possible.



Content Repurposing



Convert long videos into multiple short clips



Identify good highlights from longer content



File Organization



Organize video files in Google Drive



Maintain clear naming structure



Time Tracking



Track and document time spent per project



Provide simple weekly report of hours worked



Turnaround Time



Typical deadlines will be:



Simple edits:

24–48 hours



More complex edits:

3–4 days



Speed and reliability are important.



Required Skills



You must be comfortable with:



Video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar)



Creating captions and text overlays



Basic graphic elements



Jump cuts and pacing for social media



Exporting videos in correct aspect ratios



Experience with social media editing styles is strongly preferred.



You do NOT need many years of experience, but you must show proof of work.



Preferred Qualities



The ideal candidate is:



coachable



organized



detail-oriented



able to follow instructions exactly



proactive when something is unclear



comfortable communicating in English



I value communication and reliability more than years of experience.



Portfolio Requirement



Please include 2–3 examples of videos you have edited, especially:



short-form content (Reels / TikTok)



talking-head videos



social media clips



Links are preferred.



Application Instructions (Very Important)



Do NOT apply through the OnlineJobs.ph messaging system.



Instead, send your application to:







Your
 subject must be written exactly like this:



First Name – Last Name – Available Hours



Example:



Maria Santos – 20 Hours Weekly



If your subject line is incorrect, your application will not be reviewed.



Inside your
 include the following:



Your name



Your location



Your available hours per week



Links to video editing samples



The editing software you use



Your expected hourly rate



Also include this sentence in your
:



"The answer to 8 + 9 written in English is ______."



(Write the answer as a word, not a number.)



Applications that do not include this sentence will not be reviewed.



Test Project



After reviewing applications, I will select 3–5 finalists.



Each finalist will receive a small test editing project that should take approximately one hour to complete.



This test project will help determine who is the best fit for the role.



The candidate who produces the best result and communicates well will be hired.



Growth Opportunity



This role will begin part-time, but there is strong potential for:



more hours



ongoing weekly work



possible full-time position



I am looking for someone who wants to grow with the project long-term.



Final Note



I value clarity, communication, and reliability.



If you are someone who enjoys editing videos, following clear instructions, and helping build a growing online brand, I would love to hear from you.



Please follow the instructions carefully when applying.



Thank you.

title: Growth & Operations Specialist (Content + Outreach)
description:
Role: Growth & Operations Specialist



Type: Partner-Track / Content-Led Growth



The Mission: The Tactical Click LLC is a B2C/DTC Growth Operations & Revenue Infrastructure Agency. We turn dormant
 lists into scalable profit engines for brands generating $25,000 to $100,000+ per month.



I am hiring a Specialist to be my strategic "Right Hand." You won't just be checking boxes; you will be mastering the art of Authority Driven Growth. We need a specialist who understands that in a crowded market, your "Voice" is the only thing that disrupts a founder’s scroll and earns their trust.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. The Voice (Content Strategy & Hooks)



Hook Mastery: Craft high authority headlines and hooks for LinkedIn, IG, TikTok, and X that position the agency as the "Second Opinion" every founder needs.



Content Atomization: Take high level strategic frameworks and repurpose them into "Short Form Gold" by turning one long form thought into 5 to 10 pieces of high status content.



Engagement Ops: Monitor comments and inbound signals to identify "Warm Leads" who are ready for a diagnostic revenue conversation.



2. The Hunt (Relationship Acquisition)



Pattern Interrupt Outreach: Execute personalized outreach on LinkedIn and Instagram. We don’t "pitch" services; we diagnose monetization leaks.



The Authority DM: Initiate conversations with $25k to $100k/mo founders by offering an observation about their brand that they cannot ignore.



Pipeline Flow: Support our goal of 8 to 12 qualified discovery calls per month by moving leads from "Curious" to "Booked" inside our system.



3. The Engine (Systems & Operations)



Operational Integrity: Use Google Workspace, Slack, and ClickUp to keep the internal machine running flawlessly.



Weekly Summaries: Provide clear, data driven updates on what content is moving the needle and where the pipeline is stalling.



Working Hours & Requirements



Overlap: Must be available to overlap 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM Eastern Time.



Commitment: 10 to 12 hours per week to start.



Tool Stack: Proficiency in Google Workspace, Slack, and ClickUp is mandatory.



Mindset: Proactive and detail oriented. You don’t just find problems; you bring a solution.



4. How to Apply (The VELOCITY Filter)



To be considered, you must follow these instructions exactly. We prioritize those who can execute a brief.



Subject Line: Your application subject line MUST include the word VELOCITY.



5. Please include the following in your application:



Resume & Portfolio: Show us your best outreach samples or content you have authored.



The Loom: A 2 to 3 minute video explaining your experience with B2C/DTC brands and why you are the right "Voice" to represent a Growth Agency.



The Hook Challenge: Take a boring topic (e.g., "Why you need to
 your customers more") and write 3 Disruptive Hooks: One for a LinkedIn post, one for an IG Reel caption, and one for a short form Post (X style).



The Authority DM: Write an Instagram DM to a $50k/mo DTC founder that offers a "Second Opinion" on their brand without asking for a call or pitching a service.



The Content Pivot: If I give you a 10 minute podcast transcript of me talking about revenue leaks, what are the first 3 steps you take to turn that into high authority social content?



The Rewrite Challenge:

Improve this: “Hi [Name], I help founders improve their
 revenue. Let me know if you’d like to chat.”



Improve this: “Hey, I love your content. Would love to connect.”

title: Administrative Manager
description:
Administrative Manager (Full-Time | Remote | Residential Construction)



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)



About Us:

We are a growing residential construction and development company focused on high-quality infill housing projects. We are a small, high-performing team that takes pride in delivering exceptional results for our clients. Every tea
mber plays a meaningful role and is trusted to take ownership of their work. We value people who are highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working independently within well-defined systems and processes. Our culture is built around accountability, clear communication, and supporting one another so everyone can perform at a high level. This role is best suited for someone who enjoys taking initiative, keeping things organized, and being part of a professional team that holds itself to a high standard.



Compensation:

We offer competitive full-time compensation based on experience and performance. We value long-term tea
mbers and reward reliability, strong performance, and growth within the company. This position is best suited for someone looking for stable, long-term work with a professional team, not short-term freelance work.



Position Overview:

We are hiring a full-time Administrative Manager to oversee and coordinate the administrative operations of our company. This role serves as the organizational backbone of the team—managing communication, scheduling, documentation, and internal coordination while ensuring a smooth and professional experience for both our team and our clients.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage company and executive
 inboxes and calendars

• Communicate with U.S.-based customers by phone and

• Schedule consultations, meetings, and follow-ups

• Maintain organized digital files and documentation

• Track compliance items such as insurance certificates, lien releases, and tax filings

• Monitor deadlines and follow up with tea
mbers to keep projects moving

• Lead weekly tea
etings and help maintain accountability across the team

• Help improve and maintain company systems, organization, and workflows



Required Qualifications:

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word & Excel

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Able to work independently and manage responsibilities proactively



When applying, please address your application message to David, and begin your application message with the phrase Systems Create Success. Also please include a 30–60 second video recording of yourself describing your relevant work experience.



Thank you!

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Experienced Medical Coder/Biller
description:
Overview:

Please note this is not a job that can be done with another job as it is not an easy, "cruising" job. If you are looking to have this as a 2nd or 3rd job, this is not the right fit for you so please do not apply. And if you are looking for an easy, data entry job, this is not the right fit for you. This is a job that will help you learn and grow for those looking to further advance themselves as a biller for a long term career that will eventually become a lucrative and rewarding one. If you are interested in investing your career as a professional biller, please send a message with your resume, intro video, and phone interview availability.

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Medical Coder/Biller/Account Administrator to join our team. While prior billing is not a requirement, we will prioritize and prefer candidates who have had prior medical billing experience. Pay rate will also be reflective of this. 



In this role, you will be responsible for managing client accounts, ensuring accurate record-keeping of billing claims, and serving as the primary point of contact for patients with billing and account questions/concerns. Compensation is DOE or raises will be given according to how quickly one learns and starts contributing to the role with autonomy. 



Responsibilities:



Manage and maintain patient accounts, including billing, collections, and payment posting

Prepare and submit insurance claims accurately and on time.

Monitor accounts receivable and follow up on unpaid claims or balances.

Communicate with patients regarding billing inquiries, payment plans, and insurance coverage. Educate them on how insurance billing works and resolve all accounting issues.

Maintain accurate and confidential patient financial records in compliance with HIPAA.

Collaborate with front office staff, providers, and insurance companies to resolve account or billing issues.

Generate reports related to billing and collections as needed.

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure patients' accounts are in good standing, follow up for payment as necessary.



Requirements:



Experience in account management or administrative support roles not necessary, willing to train the right candidate if there is eagerness to learn.

Proven strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word) & Google Sheets, Gmail

Ability to work independently as well as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.

Attention to detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality work.

Job Type: Full-time

title: Info-Marketing Designer / Ad Creator
description:
About Us



We’re a fast-growing info-marketing agency that helps coaches, course creators, and mentorship brands scale through high-converting
 ads, funnels, and creative strategy.



We’re in the early stages of building out our creative team — and we’re looking for an experienced Info-Marketing Designer / Ad Creator who can bring structure, systems, and a creative edge from day one.



If you live and breathe direct-response design and know what it takes to make ads convert — this is for you.



Who We’re Looking For



You’re not a basic Canva designer. You understand marketing psychology, scroll-stopping hooks, and how visuals impact conversion rates. You’ve built ad creatives that sell — not just look good.



You’re the kind of person who can take messy ideas and turn them into a polished system for creative production. You can create templates, organize assets, and help our agency deliver ads that consistently perform.



If that sounds like you — keep reading.



Key Responsibilities



Design high-converting
 ad creatives (static, carousel, story, and reels formats)



Create visuals and layouts for landing pages, sales pages, and funnel assets



Develop brand style guides and templates to make creative production repeatable and scalable



Turn ad copy and offers into visuals that clearly communicate the message and hook



Collaborate with copywriters, media buyers, and strategists to test and iterate on creatives



Stay up-to-date with design trends and
 ad compliance standards



Requirements



2+ years of experience in info-marketing, direct-response, or social ad design



Proven ability to create conversion-driven ad creatives (not just branding)



Strong understanding of funnels, buyer psychology, and visual storytelling



Skilled in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Creative Suite



Excellent communication and English skills



Extremely organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Bonus: Experience working with course creators, coaches, or online mentorship programs



This Role is NOT For



Designers who only focus on aesthetics (not conversions)



Applicants with no
 ad or info-marketing experience



Those who need constant reminders or micromanagement



How to Apply



Use the subject line: “Info-Marketing Designer – [Your First Name]”



Tell us about a time you created or improved ad creatives that boosted performance



Include your portfolio and any ad examples or funnel designs you’ve worked on



Put Banana somewhere in the subject line. Or you will be instant declined.



State your monthly rate in USD

description:
SUMMARY



We are seeking a Social Media Manager who will be responsible for creating content and developing strategies that drive creator growth and brand impact. This role combines creativity with data-driven decision-making, crafting engaging content, optimizing influencer collaborations, and supporting creators to grow their audience and influence.



RESPONSIBILITIES

- Track, measure, and report campaign performance using key metrics such as reach, engagement, conversions, and ROI.

title: Flexible Reddit Task (Content Reposting)
description:
We’re looking for someone to help repost relevant discussions to a career and work-related subreddit.



What you’ll do:

1. Find posts from these subreddits:

   * remotework

   * RemoteJobs

   * workfromhome

2. Repost the discussion to our subreddit



Important rules:

1. Only repost text posts with 10+ comments

2. No hiring posts

3. No “for hire” posts

4. No product promotion

5. Post must be older than 24 hours and less than 3 days old



Posting rules:

1. Post 6-8 posts per day

2. Leave at least 20 minutes between posts



Time required:

1. About 10–20 minutes per day

2. Fully flexible schedule



Requirements:

1. Experience using Reddit

2. Careful and responsible posting behavior

3. Must be able to avoid spam and bans



Pay:

PHP 1,500 for 200 posts



To apply, please include:

1. How long you’ve been using Reddit

2. Link to the Reddit account you will use

3. Links to 3 posts from the subreddits listed above that meets all the important rules



This is a small, flexible task, not a full-time job.

title: Amazon Brand Manager
description:
We’re looking for a performance-driven Amazon Brand Manager to own and grow our presence across multiple Amazon storefronts. If you thrive in fast-paced e-commerce environments, know Amazon inside and out, and can juggle strategy, execution, and analysis across several brands simultaneously, this role is for you.



Responsibilities:



Multistorefront Management: Own and scale 5+ Amazon storefronts, ensuring consistent brand voice, high-quality visuals, and fully optimized listings.

Launch & Promo Strategy: Plan and execute product launches, promotions, and seasonal campaigns to maximize visibility and sales.

Performance Monitoring: Track storefront KPIs (sales, traffic, conversion, advertising ROI), customer feedback, and competitor moves—turn insights into actionable strategies.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Coordinate with creative, PPC, inventory, and logistics teams to align messaging, stock, and advertising.

Compliance & Trends: Stay up-to-date with Amazon algorithm updates, policies, and marketplace trends to maintain optimal visibility and compliance.

Listing Optimization: Implement Amazon SEO best practices—optimize titles, bullets, descriptions, keywords, and A+ content.

UX & Conversion: Lead storefront UX improvements, A/B tests, and creative updates to boost conversion and engagement.

Reporting: Produce regular dashboards and reports summarizing performance and recommending next steps for growth.



Requirements:



Proven experience managing 5+ Amazon storefronts simultaneously.

3+ years in Amazon brand management, e-commerce, or digital marketing.

Deep knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Brand Registry, A+ / Premium A+ content, and Amazon SEO.

Analytical mindset with demonstrated success in improving sales, conversion rates, and advertising ROI.

Comfortable using keyword research and listing-optimization tools; adept at data interpretation and strategic planning.

Strong project-management, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in problem-solving.

Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataHawk, or similar analytics suites is a plus.

Familiarity with Amazon DSP or external traffic/acquisition strategies is a plus.

Graphic-design chops or oversight experience for creative production is a plus.

Knowledge of international Amazon marketplaces (UK, EU, CA, etc.) is a plus.

title: Amazon Sourcing Specialist
description:
We’re seeking a detail-oriented and cost-conscious Purchasing/Sourcing Specialist to manage and optimize supplier relationships for our Amazon private-label and marketplace operations. You will lead supplier sourcing and negotiation, build landed cost models, and manage execution across samples, POs, freight, and replenishment. The ideal candidate combines sharp cost analysis with operational rigor — ensuring supply chain flows smoothly to FBA/3PL while hitting margin and targets.



Responsibilities:



Source, vet, and onboard manufacturers; run RFQs and negotiate pricing, MOQ, lead times, and payment terms

Build and maintain accurate landed cost models, factoring in duties, freight, and FBA fees to achieve margin goals

Coordinate product samples, specs, labeling, packaging, and regulatory compliance for Amazon and category standards

Create and track POs from production through delivery; ensure on-time, in-full (OTIF) performance from suppliers and carriers

Track vendor performance on cost, quality, lead time, and defect rate; lead corrective actions as needed

Conduct supplier audits and risk assessments, including geopolitical, compliance, and capacity considerations

Drive cost-saving initiatives through negotiation, packaging optimization, freight consolidation, or alternate sourcing

Support continuous improvement in sourcing processes and supplier performance



Requirements:



3+ years in purchasing, sourcing, or supply chain — ideally for Amazon FBA or e-commerce businesses

Proven experience negotiating with overseas factories, including MOQs, pricing, and payment terms

Solid understanding of landed cost analysis, profit margins, and Amazon’s fee structures

Working knowledge of quality control checkpoints and regulatory product compliance

Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills; familiarity with PO systems

Strong organization, documentation, and multi-SKU project management ability

Proactive problem-solver who can work autonomously in a fast-paced, remote environment

Familiarity with sourcing and market tools like Helium 10 or Keepa is preferred

Experience with EDI, inventory planning, or demand forecasting is preferred

Category experience in regulated goods such as home improvement products or replacement parts is a plus

Exposure to total cost of ownership (TCO) analysis in sourcing decisions is a plus

title: Amazon Catalog Manager
description:
Job Summary:



We’re seeking an experienced Amazon Catalog Manager to own end-to-end listing health and performance for a large SKU portfolio. You’ll manage backend attributes and compliance, optimize front-end content, and analyze key metrics to improve rankings, conversion, and revenue. Ideal for a data-driven operator with deep Seller Central expertise and a track record scaling large catalogs.



Responsibilities:



Catalog Management



Maintain and optimize 500+ SKUs in Seller Central, ensuring accurate categories, browse nodes, variations, and buy box–relevant settings.



Execute monthly content audits (titles, bullets, images, A+), fix suppressions/stranded inventory, and uphold Amazon TOS and compliance.



Manage backend attributes (search terms, item type keywords, intended use, target audience) and ensure listing data integrity.



Sales & Ranking Optimization



Track keyword rankings, CVR, pricing, and subcategory BSR; set weekly sales targets and target BSR per ASIN.



Identify underperforming listings and implement remediation plans (content, offers, pricing/ coupons, deals, images, reviews strategy inputs).



Monitor profitability and contribution margins, coordinating with ads and pricing to hit goals.



Insights & Collaboration



Partner with internal teams on pricing, promotions, creative, and inventory to align levers with growth targets.



Run competitive audits (content, offers, reviews, price moves) and recommend tactical adjustments.



Build and deliver actionable, data-driven performance reports and dashboards.



Requirements:



4+ years hands-on experience in Amazon Seller Central (required).



Proven success managing large catalogs (500+ SKUs) with complex variations.



Advanced Excel/Google Sheets (lookups, pivots, data cleaning).



Expert knowledge of listing optimization, keyword research/strategy, and backend attributes.



Strong grasp of Amazon TOS, compliance, suppressions, and listing health mechanics.



Familiarity with Sellerboard, Keepa, DataRova (or similar) is a plus.



Fluent English; highly organized, analytical, and self-directed.



Committed to a single full-time role.

title: TikTok Shop Content Strategist
description:
We are seeking a TikTok Shop Content Strategist who is deeply TikTok-native and experienced in both creative strategy and hands-on content creation. This role sits at the intersection of trend forecasting, performance analysis, and short-form video production, with a clear focus on driving engagement, discovery, and revenue through TikTok. You will own the TikTok content roadmap end-to-end, translating insights and trends into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven content while collaborating closely with Growth, Creative, Influencer, and Paid teams.



Responsibilities:



Own and execute the TikTok content strategy aligned with brand, growth, and product priorities

Build and manage weekly and monthly content calendars tied to launches, campaigns, and cultural 
nts

Translate performance insights into actionable creative briefs, concepts, and content themes

Identify whitespace opportunities across formats such as UGC-style content, trends, education, POVs, and product demos

Concept, script, film, and edit TikTok content optimized for platform-native performance

Create authentic, non-overproduced videos that resonate with TikTok audiences

Test multiple hooks, angles, and storytelling structures per concept and iterate rapidly based on results

Monitor TikTok trends, sounds, formats, and creator behavior, adapting them in a brand-safe and commercially relevant way

Track and analyze content performance including views, engagement, saves, CTR, and conversions

Partner with growth and paid teams to identify high-performing organic content for amplification

Collaborate with influencer, affiliate, creative, and brand teams to ensure consistency in voice, tone, and visual identity

Support product launches with high-impact TikTok storytelling



Requirements:



1–2+ years of experience creating and/or strategizing TikTok content for a brand or creator account

Deep understanding of TikTok trends, algorithms, and creator culture

Proven ability to produce content that drives both engagement and conversion

Strong storytelling instincts with a clear focus on hooks and retention

Comfortable being on camera and directing others on camera when needed

Highly organized, fast-moving, and comfortable testing, learning, and iterating quickly

Data-informed creative mindset with a focus on performance over vanity metrics

title: Digital Marketing Specialist - Long term (morning shift)
description:
TITLE:

Digital Marketing Coordinator (aka; Advertising, Media & Communications Manager)



BUSINESS:

Our business is a dream to work for…

• We provide content promotion and lead generation to global personalities and professionals.

• Our focus (and soon to be your focus) is to help global personalities and professionals succeed by driving attention to their most powerful educational content and drive leads to their business to increase their sales. To do this, we recruit the best video editors, graphic designers, content writers, paid ad media buyers and more.



ROLE:

This role is perfect for you, if…

• You are looking to work in a role of an experienced Digital Marketing Coordinator

• You want to work on multiple clients marketing campaigns, working with media buyers/graphic designers/video editors/content writers

• You have confidence and enjoy speaking professionally with clients (written and verbal)

• You want to work remotely, full time (40 hours) a week - Monday to Friday

• You’re interested in Day Shift hours, during Melbourne, Australia business hours

• You have a University Level Education

• And, you already have advanced skills in building (or running) paid digital advertising campaigns



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your responsibilities will include…

• Build and execute comprehensive project plans for marketing campaigns

• Coordinate with internal and external delivery teams, including clients, graphic designers, content writers, video editors, content writers, media buyers and developers

• Enforce end-to-end message congruency from the ad creative, ad copy, landing page copy, resource, etc

• Define the #1 pain point being solved by the campaign and ensure it hits the desired target market

• Identify project issues, roadblocks or missing requirements quickly and resolve proactively

• If necessary, re-write and optimise content - such as; ad copy, funnel copy,
 copy, etc

• Ensure a campaign has the highest chance of success prior to going live

• Document and handover all campaign, funnel and ad resources to media buyer for them to manage post go-live

We will provide training on how to execute each item above, as long as you are the type of person who has the will to learn and master it.



REQUIREMENTS:

To be considered for this position, you are required to:

• You need to have a proven solid work experience as a digital marketing coordinator of at least 2+ years

• You need to have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 processor and 8gb of RAM

• You need to have a 2nd computer screen in your home office

• You need to have a fast and reliable Internet connection, with access to a back-up

• You have leadership abilities, decision-making skills, and problem-solving capabilities.

• You have proven experience as a content writer in lead generation, or project manager in a lead generation, or operated in a digital marketing environment.

• You have a results-driven mindset with a commitment to achieving project objectives.

• You have a strong attention to detail and highly organised

• You have a friendly, upbeat and team focused attitude

• Most importantly, you desire to learn and obtain new responsibilities



SOFTWARE & TOOLS:

• Zoom - video meetings (internal team and client communication)

• Loom - screen recording software (internal team and client communication)

• Slack - internal communication tool

• ClickUp - task management software

• Google
 (gmail)

• Google Drive

• Google Sheets



How to Apply: Attached your CV link with your cover letter

title: Influencer Coordinator

title: TikTok Shop Operations Manager
description:
Own end-to-end TikTok Shop operations for creator storefronts. You will set up shops, manage product catalogs, coordinate fulfillment, ensure policy compliance, and build scalable processes so creators can sell without friction. This role suits a highly organized, proactive operator who loves turning moving parts into clean, reliable systems.



Responsibilities:



Lead onboarding and configuration of new TikTok Shops for creators, ensuring fast, accurate setup.

Manage the full product listing lifecycle: uploads, keywords, creatives, pricing updates, inventory sync, and listing health.

Coordinate order flow between internal fulfillment systems and TikTok Shop; monitor SLAs, troubleshoot shipping and OMS issues, and resolve exceptions.

Maintain platform compliance by mastering TikTok Shop policies, guidelines, rating standards, and best practices.

Partner with Creator Management and DTC Strategy on promos and campaigns; provide operational readiness plans and post-mortems.

Build and maintain SOPs, checklists, and documentation; design scalable processes and automations to reduce errors and manual work.

Track operational KPIs such as listing accuracy, order cycle times, cancellation rate, on-time ship rate, and store rating; surface insights and corrective actions.

2+ years in e-commerce operations, marketplace management, or similar operational role. Direct TikTok Shop experience is a strong plus.

Proven organizational rigor and attention to detail across multi-step workflows and cross-team dependencies.

Strong problem solving skills with the ability to anticipate risks, triage issues, and drive resolutions quickly.

title: Lead Generation Specialist – Build Gift Shop & Retail Store Lists (Remote)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to help build targeted contact lists of retail stores across the United States.



Our company, Elumina Decor, sells unique LED infinity mirror decorations for holidays such as Halloween and Christmas. These products are sold in gift shops, seasonal stores, boutique retailers, and home décor stores.



Your role will be to research and compile lists of retail stores that could sell our products wholesale.



This job requires strong internet research skills and attention to detail.



Responsibilities



You will research stores using sources such as:



• Google Maps

• Yelp

• Shopify store directories

• Store websites

• Instagram business pages



You will search for stores such as:



• Gift shops

• Holiday décor stores

• Halloween stores

• Christmas stores

• Home décor stores

• Boutique retailers

• Tourist gift shops

• Seasonal stores

• Mall gift shops



Your job is to find stores and enter their information into a spreadsheet.



Required Data Fields



For each store you will collect:



• Store Name

• City

• State

• Phone Number

•
 Address (if available)

• Website URL

• Contact Name (if available)

• Notes (example: sells holiday decor)



Example of Completed Lead



Store Name: Holiday Market

City: Nashville

State: TN

Phone: 615-xxx-xxxx

: 



Website: 



Weekly Expectations



You will be expected to produce 200–500 qualified leads per week.



Accuracy is extremely important. Duplicate or incorrect information should be avoided.



Tools Used



• Google Maps

• Excel or Google Sheets

• Basic internet research



No advanced software is required.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has experience with lead generation or internet research

• Is organized and detail oriented

• Has strong English comprehension

• Can follow instructions carefully

• Works efficiently and consistently



Experience with lead generation, market research, or data entry is a plus.



Test Task



To confirm you read this job post, please start your application with the word:



"Infinity"



Applicants who do not include this will not be considered.



You may also be asked to provide 5 sample leads for gift shops in the United States as part of the hiring process.



This position can grow into a long-term role with additional responsibilities such as
 outreach and store contact.

title: Casual CRM Expert (API + Integrations)

title: Short-Form Video Editor & Ad Creator (Facebook / Instagram Ads)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a creative video editor and content creator who can turn raw footage into high-converting social media ads.



Our company, Elumina Decor, sells LED infinity mirror decorations for holidays such as Halloween and Christmas. Our products are very visual and work well in short-form social media ads.

, Instagram, and TikTok.

 or Instagram ads is a strong advantage.

“Mirror”

title: Wholesale Outreach & Cold Calling Specialist (Phone + Email)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a professional and reliable outreach specialist to contact retail stores across the United States and introduce our wholesale products.



Our company Elumina Decor creates unique LED infinity mirror holiday decorations that are popular in gift shops, seasonal stores, boutique retailers, and home décor stores.



Your role will be to contact retail stores from a lead list, introduce our products, send our wholesale catalog by
, follow up with interested stores, and record potential orders.



This role combines cold calling,
 outreach, and follow-up communication.



The goal is to identify stores interested in carrying our products and help move them toward placing wholesale orders.



Responsibilities



Your responsibilities will include:



Phone Outreach



• Call retail stores from a provided lead list

• Ask for the person responsible for purchasing or buying decisions

• Introduce our wholesale product line

• Ask permission to send our wholesale catalog and pricing sheet



 Outreach



• Send wholesale catalogs and pricing sheets to interested stores

• Respond to basic questions from retailers

• Follow up with stores that received our catalog



Follow Up



• Call or
 stores that expressed interest

• Answer basic questions about pricing or ordering

• Remind stores about seasonal products (Halloween / Christmas)



Order Coordination



• Record potential wholesale orders from stores

• Collect order information if a store wants to purchase

• Send order details to our management team for processing



CRM / Tracking



• Record call results in a spreadsheet or CRM

• Track store contact information and responses

• Maintain organized records of interested stores



Example Call Script



Example introduction:



Hi, my name is calling on behalf of Elumina Decor.

We create LED infinity mirror holiday decorations that sell very well in gift shops and seasonal stores.

I wanted to ask who handles wholesale purchasing for your store.



If interested:



Great! I can send you our wholesale catalog and pricing sheet by
 so you can take a look.



Expected Activity



Typical weekly activity may include:



• 60–100 calls per day

• Sending catalogs by

• Following up with interested stores

• Updating store records in a spreadsheet



Ideal Candidate

, and LinkedIn messaging systems.

title: Shopify E-commerce CFO / Financial Controller
description:
Job Post: Shopify E-commerce P&L Expert Needed (7-Figure+/Month Brand, Full-Year Analysis)

Are you an experienced e-commerce finance expert with deep Shopify expertise, and a proven track record of building accurate, actionable P&Ls for 7- and 8-figure Shopify brands? We’re looking for someone who truly understands the complexity of high-volume Shopify e-commerce and can bring order to financial chaos.



About Us

We run a high-volume DTC e-commerce brand on Shopify, generating over $1,000,000 per month in revenue. Our in-house team is already familiar with cash flow, transaction fees, gross margin calculations, and the fundamentals of e-commerce accounting—we’re looking for a true specialist who can deliver advanced insights and structure.

After a year of rapid growth, multiple sales channels, and various costs (ad spend, agency fees, COGS, returns, tools, etc.), we need an expert to create a detailed P&L overview for the entire last year.



What We Need

A full, detailed Profit & Loss statement (P&L) for 2024 (or 2023).



Source data: Exported files from Shopify, bank (CSV/Excel), ad spend reports, invoices (all provided via Google Drive/Dropbox).



You’ll organize and clarify: All revenue, refunds, COGS, ad costs, agency/tool fees, shipping, transaction fees, VAT, and other key categories.



No direct access to bank accounts or Shopify; you’ll work from exported files only.



We do NOT need basic explanations of cash flow or transaction fees—we want someone who can go deeper, spot missed opportunities, suggest process improvements, and provide advanced reporting or dashboarding if needed.



Who You Are

Extensive experience with Shopify financials: You have managed P&L for DTC brands on Shopify with at least $1M+ monthly revenue.



Proven portfolio: You’ve created full-year P&Ls for similar high-volume brands (please provide samples!).



Deep knowledge of Shopify reporting, payouts, returns, and COGS structure.



Strong understanding of e-commerce KPIs and advanced cash flow management.



Proactive in spotting errors, anomalies, or optimization opportunities.



Fluent in English, highly detail-oriented, and reliable.



Discreet and trustworthy; willing to sign NDA if required.



How We Work

You’ll receive all relevant exports and invoices via a secure cloud folder (Google Drive/Dropbox).



You may request additional clarification if something is missing or unclear.



No need to access any live accounts.



To Apply

Briefly describe your Shopify and high-volume e-commerce finance experience (brands, platforms, tools).



Share at least one sample P&L or case study (personal info redacted).



Share your proposed process and expected timeline.



Your rate for the project.



Note: Applicants without strong Shopify experience and proven work for 7- or 8-figure monthly DTC brands will not be considered.
salary: good salary, we do on project basis

title: Sales VA - Automation & Systems
description:
Hey — welcome!



We're hiring a Sales & Automation VA — a tech-first operator who can own the backend systems and can show up on the front lines of the sales process. 



About the Role

You'll be the person who builds and maintains the automations that keep the pipeline running and steps in to follow up with leads, confirm calls, and make sure no opportunity slips through the cracks.

You'll be working primarily inside GoHighLevel, handling CRM management, automation workflows, SMS and call-based follow-up, and pipeline reporting.



Your Key Responsibilities

Automation & Systems (Your Primary Strength)

Build and maintain workflows and automations inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

Set up and troubleshoot SMS,
, and pipeline automations end-to-end

Integrate platforms using n8n, Zapier, or similar tools

Document all systems and create SOPs for repeatable processes

Monitor active automations and proactively flag errors or drop-offs

Use AI tools to speed up tasks, draft outreach, and improve reporting



Sales Support 

Manage and update CRM pipelines in GHL 

Nurture unconverted leads with timely, well-crafted follow-up

Track and report on key metrics: conversion rates, booking rates, follow-up response rates

Prepare weekly summaries on pipeline performance and flag opportunities to the team



Role Requirements

Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) — automations, pipelines, CRM management

Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, or Make for workflow automation

Comfortable with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) for productivity and outreach

Experience with SMS and call-based lead follow-up or sales support

Strong written communication 

Highly organized with sharp attention to detail 

EST-aligned availability

Growth mindset — you're always looking to improve how things work



The Hiring Process

We believe in transparency. Here's exactly what to expect:

Initial Application Review — If you're moving forward, you'll receive an application form within 5 business days.

Skills Assessment — A focused 30–60 minute task that reflects real work in this role.

Interview Stage — If your assessment stands out, we'll reach out with an offer or a brief interview.

Final Steps — There may be additional steps — we'll always be upfront about what's next.





How to Apply

Show us you pay attention to detail. Follow these steps exactly:

1) Change your subject line to: "Applying for Sales & Automation VA - [Insert your country's capital city]"

2) Answer this question: Describe a system or automation you've built that made a real difference — what was the problem, what did you build, and what changed?

3) Attach your resume and any relevant portfolio links (GHL screenshots, workflow builds, Loom walkthroughs, GitHub, etc.)

4) Include any references you have.





Perks

FULLY REMOTE — work from wherever you're most effective

Commission incentive

Access to world-class tools, training, and processes

EST-based working hours with flexible scheduling

Real growth path — the right person can expand their responsibilities fast

A tight-knit team that moves quickly, values your work, and actually celebrates wins





Our Values

Speed is king — Think "I'll do it now," not "I'll get to it later." High-priority tasks get handled immediately.

Over-deliver value — Good enough isn't good enough. We aim for excellent every time.

1?tter every day — A growth mindset is everything. We get better at our craft daily — and we expect the same from our team.





About Our Founders

John & Phoenix have generated millions in direct and indirect revenue through their expertise in copywriting, funnel building, and coaching. They've helped numerous businesses scale and grow through proven systems and strategies — and they genuinely care about the people on their team.



Note: This role is being placed on behalf of a client through Cyborg VA talent network. You'll be vetted and onboarded by the sprintguys team, then placed directly with the client for day-to-day work.





We're filling this role ASAP and reviewing applications as they come in. The right candidate can start immediately.

Ready to build and sell? Apply today.

title: Ads Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results

 body:

 to leave?

Work can include anything within DTC e-commerce industry, but ideally aligned to the role you are applying for. If you don’t have DTC experience, submit your best work portfolio. title: Meta and TikTok Ad Specialist
description:
Job Title: Paid Ads Specialist 
 & TikTok) - Medical Spa Clients



Company: The King Of Content

Job Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Salary: $1,000 - $1,500 USD per month (approx. 56,000 - 84,000) - Based on experience & performance





About Us:



The King Of Content is a premier brand positioning firm in the US, dedicated to helping medical spa owners dominate their local markets. We are a strategic partner to our clients, providing them with the visibility and positioning they need to attract high-value clients. 



Job Description:



We are looking for a skilled and experienced Paid Ads Specialist to manage our clients' advertising campaigns on
, Instagram, and TikTok. You will be the expert in charge of the entire ad process for our medical spa clients, from campaign setup and launch to continuous monitoring, optimization, and reporting.



This is a key role on our team, and you will be working directly on high-impact campaigns that drive client growth. The ideal candidate is data-driven, has a deep understanding of the Meta and TikTok ad platforms, and has a proven track record of running successful campaigns that deliver a strong Return on Ad Spend (ROAS).



Responsibilities:



Campaign Management: Set up, launch, and manage paid ad campaigns across
, Instagram, and TikTok for our medical spa clients.



Optimization: Continuously monitor ad performance and make data-driven adjustments to improve key metrics like Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), Click-Through Rate (CTR), and ROAS.



Audience & Creative Testing: A/B test different ad creatives, copy, and audiences to identify winning combinations and scale successful campaigns.



Reporting: Track and analyze campaign results, and prepare clear, concise weekly and monthly reports for our team and clients.



Budget Management: Manage and allocate client ad budgets effectively to maximize results and hit performance targets.



Pixel & Conversion Tracking: Ensure proper setup and firing of Meta Pixel and TikTok Pixel for accurate conversion tracking and retargeting.



Requirements (Hard Skills):

Proven experience (2+ years) running successful paid ad campaigns on
, Instagram, and TikTok.

Deep, hands-on expertise with Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager.

Strong experience with pixel/tag setup, custom audiences, lookalike audiences, retargeting, and conversion API.

Strong analytical skills and a data-driven approach to optimization, with a deep understanding of CPA, CTR, ROAS, and other key metrics.

Experience with A/B testing ad creatives, copy, and audiences.

Familiarity with the medical spa, beauty, or wellness industry is a major plus.



Requirements (Soft Skills):

Excellent English communication skills (both written and verbal).

Highly organized and detail-oriented.

Proactive and able to work independently to manage campaigns and meet deadlines.

A team player who is open to feedback and collaboration.



Benefits & Perks:

Competitive Salary: A salary package that rewards expertise and results.

Performance Bonuses: Opportunity for bonuses based on hitting client targets (e.g., ROAS, CPA).

Paid Time Off: Paid leave for holidays and personal time.

Growth Opportunity: Be a core member of a growing team with opportunities for advancement.



How to Apply:



To show you have read this job post carefully, please use "KOC TikTok & Meta Specialist" as the subject line of your application.



In your application, please answer the following three questions:



1. What is the largest monthly ad budget you have managed across
 and 
 combined?



2. What is the best Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) you have achieved on a campaign in the last 12 months? Please specify the platform.



3. Briefly describe your process for testing new ad creatives.



Please also include a link to your portfolio or provide 1-2 screenshots of campaign results you are proud of.

title: Outbound DM Setter & Discord Community Manager (Aussie Education Niche)
description:
About the Role:

I run a high-ticket, premiu
ntorship program for high school students in Australia (specifically targeting the HSC exams - bit not limited to). We help stressed students build elite study systems so they can dominate their exams.



I am looking for a hungry, highly organised Virtual Assistant to take over my social media DMs (Instagram/TikTok) and manage my private 
 community.



What You Will Do (The Daily Workflow):



- Warm Outbound DMs: You will proactively message every single new person who follows my Instagram/TikTok and every new student who joins the 
 server.



- Lead Qualification: You will use my proven scripts to have natural, casual conversations with students, figure out their pain points, and get them to fill out the mentorship application form - this is how I will be tracking your conversions.



- 
 Hype: You will welcome new members publicly, start daily conversations, post polls, answer questions and keep the community highly engaged and active.



Who You Are:



- Culturally Fluent: You must be able to text like a young Australian. If you use phrases like "Greetings Sir," "Kindly provide your details," or "How may I assist you today?" - this is NOT the job for you. You need to be comfortable saying things like "Yo," "Keen," "Heaps,", "For sure" and "ATAR" etc.



- Proactive: You don't wait for leads to message us; you hunt for them by welcoming new followers. You reply promptly, not letting the lead's motivation drop off.



- Organised: You never let a conversation drop or a lead slip through the cracks.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY - THIS IS A TEST):

I am shortlisting candidates immediately. Do NOT send a generic cover letter. To apply, send me a message with the following:



Subject Line: Put the word "DOMINATE" in the subject line.



Your Experience: 2-3 sentences max on your experience with Instagram DMs or 
 management.



The Vibe Check (Crucial): Imagine a new 17-year-old student just joined our 
 server. They haven't said anything yet. Write exactly what you would DM them to start a conversation and see if they are struggling. Show me your casual, Aussie tone.

title: DME Intake Operator
description:
DME Virtual Intake Operator – Overview



A DME (Durable Medical Equipment) Virtual Intake Operator is responsible for efficiently handling incoming DME orders via phone, ensuring a seamless intake process from order to fulfillment. This role requires a strong understanding of various insurance payers and their requirements, including obtaining prior authorizations in a timely manner to avoid delays in patient care. The operator must be familiar with a wide range of DME categories (e.g., mobility aids, respiratory equipment, orthotics) and possess basic sales skills to guide patients and providers through product options.



Key responsibilities include verifying insurance coverage, creating and managing physician orders, submitting authorization requests, and coordinating drop-shipment directly from manufacturers. The Virtual Intake Operator plays a critical role in streamlining DME services, ensuring compliance, and enhancing the patient and provider experience through efficient and accurate service delivery. We will Train, experience in Niko Health and DME Services a Plus

title: Real Estate Content Video Editor
description:
Job Posting: Real Estate Video Editor (Long-Form + Short-Form)



Part-Time / Contract – Remote



IMPORTANT: If you have ZERO experience creating content for real estate, and/or experience working with real estate clients, please do NOT apply. Thank you**



We’re looking for a dedicated, skilled, creative Video Editor with experience editing content in the real estate industry** who can turn raw footage into clean, polished, engaging videos designed to educate home buyers and sellers, build trust, and drive lead generation for real estate agents.



If you can skillfully edit both long-form (YouTube) and short-form vertical videos (Reels/Shorts/TikTok) with clean captions, strong pacing, and a modern style, at a quick turnaround time — you’ll be a great fit.



About the Role:

- You will edit ongoing video content for real estate agents, including:

           - Educational YouTube videos

           - Market update videos

           - Buyer/seller tips

           - Short-form vertical videos

           - Video ads for
, Instagram, and YouTube

           - Listing or neighborhood b-roll overlays when needed

We will provide raw clips, brand guidelines, examples, and clear notes for each project.



What We’re Looking For / Required Skills:

- Experience editing different styles of real estate videos catered to different avatars (luxury, first time buyers, home owners, sellers, motivated sellers, downsizers, etc

- Strong short-form editing skills: hooks, pacing, pattern interrupts

- Clean, modern captioning (not overly stylized)

- Ability to edit for multiple platforms:

         - 9:16 Reels/Shorts

         - 16:9 YouTube

         - 1:1
 feed (optional but preferred)

- Strong audio cleanup (noise reduction, clarity, leveling)

- Basic color correction

- Familiarity with real estate content (buyer/seller education, listing videos, etc.)

- Reliable turnaround time and communication



Qualifications:

      - Proven Video Editing Expertise: proficiency in video editing with a keen eye for creativity, storytelling, and detail.

      - Creative Vision: Ability to exhibit creative, innovative flair and storytelling to projects

      - Adaptability: Flexibility to adjust to changing creative directions and project requirements.

      - Ability to adjust editing style and messaging for distinct audiences—such as luxury buyers, first-time home buyers, distressed home sellers

      - Has the drive, hunger, and ability to do whatever it takes to materialize the creative vision and make deadlines



Bonus Skills (Preferred):

- Thumbnail creation

- Motion graphics

- Understanding of real estate compliance (no guarantees, no misleading claims)

- Experience with YouTube retention-focused editing



Responsibilities:

        - Edit long-form and short-form videos in a clean, modern style

        - Add captions using on-brand styling

        - Add b-roll, graphics, and minimal effects where appropriate

        - Maintain consistent pacing and high retention

        - Export in the correct aspect ratios and file formats

        - Deliver revisions in a timely manner

        - excellent/reliable communication

        - reliable internet/power connections

        - Organize files properly within Drive/Dropbox



Tools You Should Be Comfortable With:

         - Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro

         - Google Drive / Dropbox

         - Basic audio enhancement tools

         - Canva or Photoshop for thumbnails



Turnaround Expectations:

       - Short-form videos: 24–48 hours

       - Long-form videos: 3–5 days

Batch projects: timelines provided per batch



Reliability and communication is very important.



Compensation:

         - Rates will depend on experience and skills.

Please provide:

           - Your rate per short-form video

           - Your rate for long-form edits (
+ minutes)

           - Your monthly retainer options (optional)



How to Apply:

Please submit:

        - Your real estate editing portfolio

        - (Reels/Shorts + YouTube long-form examples required)

        - A brief note about your experience with real estate content

        - resume

        - The tools/software you use

        - Availability (hours/week)

        - upload 2–3 of your best short-form reels

        - upload 2-3 of your best long form videos

        - Your rates and typical turnaround time



What Happens Next:

        - Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test edit to evaluate creativity, style, pacing, captions, and delivery.



P.S., if you have ZERO experience in any of these fields, no portfolio of past real estate works, or cannot fulfill requirements-------please do NOT apply.  Thank you!

title: Documentary Video Editor (Long-Form Storytelling)
description:
The Project



We are a fast-growing digital media production house producing long-form documentary content built around investigative material, archival footage, and high-stakes human stories.



Our focus is on high-quality storytelling, not fast or disposable content. The goal is to create edits that feel closer to a premium documentary than a typical YouTube video.



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor who understands pacing, narrative structure, and how to keep viewers engaged throughout a long-form story.



The Role



You will work with scripts, research materials, and provided footage to craft tight, compelling documentary edits.



The ideal candidate understands how to build tension, guide the viewer through complex stories, and maintain engagement across 25–40 minute videos.



Key Responsibilities



Narrative Editing

Transform raw footage, scripts, and visual assets into a structured and engaging documentary edit.



Pacing & Structure

Maintain strong story rhythm to keep viewers engaged throughout long-form content.



Visual Integration

Use archival footage, b-roll, graphics, and other visual elements to support the narrative.



Audio & Atmosphere

Incorporate music and sound design to enhance tension and emotional impact without overpowering the story.



Collaboration

Work closely with our research and writing teams to ensure accuracy and clarity in the final edit.



What We’re Looking For



Story Instincts

You understand how pacing, timing, and structure affect audience engagement.



Attention to Detail

You notice small issues in cuts, audio, or pacing and refine them.



Professionalism

You communicate clearly and can work within a collaborative production environment.



Preferred Experience



Documentary or investigative content editing



Long-form storytelling edits



Experience working with narrative scripts



Submission Requirements



Portfolio

Please send 2–3 examples of your best edits, preferably long-form storytelling or documentary-style work.



Application

Simply message us the link to your portfolio. We will review all submissions and reach out if your work is a good fit to proceed with a trial task.



Note: Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed.

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY

Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV

title: Expert Shopify Website Developer
description:
We are a growing e-commerce company looking for a highly experienced Shopify Developer/Designer to replicate a specific reference website exactly 1-1.



If you are a beginner or rely on basic pre-made templates without the ability to customize them pixel-perfectly, please do not apply. We need someone who has a sharp eye for detail and can deliver an exact clone of the design, layout, and functionality provided.



Your Responsibilities:



Build and design a Shopify store that is a 100% exact match (1-1) to the reference website we will provide.



Ensure the site is fully responsive and looks perfect on both desktop and mobile devices.



Optimize the website for fast loading speeds.



Install and configure necessary apps to match the functionality of the reference site.



Requirements:



Proven, extensive experience in Shopify website design and development (Liquid coding experience is a major plus).



A strong portfolio showcasing previous Shopify websites you have built from scratch or heavily customized.



Extreme attention to detail—the final result must be a pixel-perfect replication.



Good communication skills and the ability to meet deadlines.



How to Apply:

To ensure you have read this entire job post, please include the word "PIXEL" at the very beginning of your subject line or application message.



In your proposal, you MUST include:



A brief summary of your Shopify experience.



Links to your portfolio or at least 3-5 live Shopify websites you have designed/built.



Applications without a portfolio will be automatically ignored.

title: Meta Ads Specialist (Part-Time / Freelance)
description:
We're looking for a results-driven Junior Meta Ads Specialist to join our digital marketing team. You'll work closely with our team to set up, manage, and 
 paid social campaigns across
 and Instagram for a range of clients. This is a great opportunity for someone who takes ownership of their work and thrives in a collaborative, fast-paced environment.

What You'll Do



Set up and manage Meta ad campaigns 
 & Instagram) across various client accounts

Develop and refine campaign strategies aligned with client goals and budgets

Monitor campaign performance and implement optimisations to improve results

Conduct audience research and build targeted audience segments

Research and analyse competitor ads, strategies, and market positioning to inform campaign direction

Design ad creatives and visual assets using Canva

Create and test ad copy, creatives, and landing page recommendations

Provide regular performance updates and insights to the team

Collaborate with the wider marketing team on integrated campaign strategies



What We're Looking For



1–2 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Solid understanding of Meta Business Manager, campaign objectives, and bidding strategies

Experience with audience targeting, retargeting, and pixel setup

Strong competitor research skills — ability to analyse competitor ads using Meta Ad Library and other tools

Comfortable analysing campaign data and making data-driven decisions

Proactive — you spot opportunities and act on them without waiting to be told

A true team player who communicates openly and supports those around them

Takes full ownership of their work and delivers on commitments

Strong attention to detail and a sense of accountability



Nice to Have



Canva or graphic design skills for creating ad creatives and visual content

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

Familiarity with other paid channels or marketing automation tools



Why Join Us



Work with a supportive and collaborative marketing team

Gain exposure to diverse client accounts across different industries

Flexible working setup



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, please submit the following:



Resume — outlining your experience and relevant skills

Portfolio — showcasing Meta ad campaigns you've worked on, including creatives, results, or case studies where possible

2-Minute Introduction Video — tell us who you are, your experience with Meta Ads, and why you're a great fit for this role. Be yourself — we'd love to get a sense of your personality and communication style!



Applications without a video introduction, portfolio, and resume will not be considered.

title: Customer Service Operations Manager (Systems & Strategy Focus)
description:
This is NOT a support agent role. 

We are not looking for someone to just 'answer
s.' We are an established e-commerce business seeking a heavyweight Customer Service Operations Manager. Our department needs a complete structural overhaul. We need a leader who can audit our current mess, implement ironclad workflows, and build a data-driven department from the ground up.



If you haven't managed a team, built KPI dashboards, or successfully re-engineered a CS department before, this role is not for you.



Your Mission:

• Audit & Reconstruct: You will take our current CS department "upside down." Identify every bottleneck, every leak in our dispute process, and every point of friction for the customer.

• System Implementation: You will design and implement the SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) that our team follows. You ensure that how we work is scalable and efficient.

• KPI Ownership: You will define the metrics that matter. You won't just report numbers; you will explain why they are happening and how you are improving them (CSAT, First Response, Refund Ratios, Dispute Win Rates).

• Revenue Protection: You will oversee the management of payment inquiries and disputes, ensuring we maintain a healthy standing with providers like Klarna and PayPal through superior service and documentation.

• Leadership & Accountability: You manage the remote team. You are responsible for their output, their quality, and their adherence to your new structures.



Hard Requirements:

• Proven Track Record: At least 2-3 years of Management/Operations experience in high-volume E-commerce (Dropshipping experience is a massive plus).

• Structure Builder: You must demonstrate that you have previously built or significantly improved a CS department’s structure (not just worked within one).

• Tech Stack Mastery: Expert-level knowledge of Freshdesk and Shopify. You should know how to use these tools to automate and track everything.

• Data Literacy: You live in the numbers. You know how to turn raw data into actionable insights for the business owners.

• Fluent English: High-level professional writing is non-negotiable.



Application Instructions (Read Carefully):

To apply, you must include the word "SKYBLUE" in your response.



Crucial: Do not just send a standard resume. Along with your CV, please provide a brief summary (3-5 sentences) of a specific CS structure or KPI system you implemented in a previous role and the measurable impact it had on the business.

description:

What You’ll Be Doing

-Create scrollable carousel image sets for listings that showcase features, lifestyle use, benefits, and comparison charts.

-Design A+ content (EBC) modules including branded banners, infographics, and product storytelling sections.
